29315.title: The Economic Impacts of the US-China Trade War
29315.zh_title: 中美贸易战的经济影响
29315.abstract: In 2018, the US launched a trade war with China, an abrupt departure from its historical leadership in integrating global markets. By late 2019, the US had imposed tariffs on roughly $\$350$ billion of Chinese imports, and China had retaliated on $\$100$ billion US exports. Economists have used a diversity of data and methods to assess the impacts of the trade war on the US, China and other countries. This article reviews what we have learned to date from this work.
29315.zh_abstract: 2018年，美国对中国发起了贸易战，这与其在整合全球市场方面的历史领导地位截然不同。到2019年底，美国已对约3500亿美元的中国进口商品加征关税，中国也对1000亿美元的美国出口商品进行了报复。经济学家们运用多种数据和方法评估了贸易战对美国、中国及其他国家的影响。本文回顾了迄今为止我们从这些研究中了解到的内容。

29314.title: The Role of Trade in Economic Development
29314.zh_title: 贸易在经济发展中的作用
29314.abstract: This chapter (to appear in the forthcoming Handbook of International Economics, Vol. 5) develops a framework with which to interpret and survey answers to the question: how does increased openness affect aggregate welfare in a typical developing country? We decompose answers into four mechanisms: (i) an effect akin to technological progress that is purely mechanical; (ii) an effect on factoral terms of trade; (iii) a distortion revenue effect that exacerbates or mitigates the consequences of domestic distortions; and (iv) an effect of trade on the magnitude of those distortions themselves. Our focus lies in the last two mechanisms as these are especially important for the study of low-income settings where domestic distortions are thought to be rife. Throughout, we provide both a review of existing work on these topics and quantitative calculations that aim to gauge the magnitudes involved in a global model that is calibrated to match firm- and industry-level data on trade flows, production techniques, and a host of distortions (tariffs, other taxes, markups, bribes, theft, credit constraints, contracting failures, labor regulations, and public utility provision) that have featured in the literature.
29314.zh_abstract: 本章（将收录于即将出版的《国际经济学手册》第五卷）构建了一个框架，用以解释和综述以下问题的答案：在一个典型的发展中国家，开放程度的提高如何影响总体福利？我们将答案分解为四种机制：（i）类似于技术进步且纯粹机械性的效应；（ii）对要素贸易条件的影响；（iii）扭曲收入效应，该效应会加剧或减轻国内扭曲的后果；以及（iv）贸易对这些扭曲本身规模的影响。我们的重点在于最后两种机制，因为它们对于研究国内扭曲被认为普遍存在的低收入环境尤为重要。在整个过程中，我们既回顾了关于这些主题的现有研究，也进行了定量计算，旨在评估一个全球模型中所涉及的数量级，该模型经过校准，以匹配关于贸易流动、生产技术以及一系列扭曲（关税、其他税收、加成率、贿赂、盗窃、信贷约束、合同失败、劳动法规和公共事业供给）的企业和行业层面数据，这些扭曲在文献中均有涉及。

29313.title: Foreign Investors and US Treasuries
29313.zh_title: 外国投资者与美国国债
29313.authors: Alexandra M. Tabova, Francis E. Warnock
29313.abstract: We build, from confidential security-level surveys, a novel dataset on the size, flows, coupon payments, and returns of the US Treasuries portfolios of foreign and US investors. The internally consistent dataset provides evidence on foreigners’ Treasuries portfolios that sharply contrasts with what is portrayed in the literature. Foreigners do not earn spectacularly low returns; they have higher average annual risk-adjusted returns than US investors (although the differences are well within the bounds of standard confidence intervals), as US investors’ strong mean returns are accompanied by higher volatility. Foreigners do not buy Treasuries when they are expensive; dollar-weighted returns that capture the timing and volume of purchases show that both private and official foreigners outperform US investors. And private foreign investors do not have inelastic demand; they are price sensitive, increasing purchases of Treasuries and the duration of their Treasury portfolios when non-US sovereign yields are low or decrease relative to Treasury yields. Our results should inform many literatures, including any that use data on international positions and flows. In fact, an important practical contribution is that the dataset shows which publicly available data on foreigners’ flows should (and should not) be used.
29313.zh_abstract: 我们利用保密的证券层面调查，构建了一个关于外国和美国投资者持有的美国国债组合的规模、流动、息票支付和回报的新数据集。这个内部一致的数据集提供了关于外国人美国国债组合的证据，与文献中所描绘的情况形成鲜明对比。外国人并未获得极低的回报；他们的平均年化风险调整后回报高于美国投资者（尽管差异在标准置信区间范围内），因为美国投资者的强劲平均回报伴随着更高的波动性。外国人并非在国债昂贵时买入；捕捉购买时机和数量的美元加权回报显示，私人和官方外国投资者的表现均优于美国投资者。私人外国投资者并非需求缺乏弹性；他们对价格敏感，当非美国主权收益率较低或相对于美国国债收益率下降时，他们会增加对美国国债的购买以及其国债组合的久期。我们的研究结果应为众多文献提供信息，包括任何使用国际头寸和流动数据的文献。事实上，一个重要的实际贡献是，该数据集显示了哪些公开可用的外国人流动数据应该（以及不应该）被使用。

29312.title: Task Allocation and On-the-job Training
29312.authors: Mariagiovanna Baccara, SangMok Lee, Leeat Yariv
29312.abstract: We study dynamic task allocation when providers' expertise evolves endogenously through training. We characterize optimal assignment protocols and compare them to discretionary procedures, where it is the clients who select their service providers. Our results indicate that welfare gains from centralization are greater when tasks arrive more rapidly, and when training technologies improve. Monitoring seniors' backlog of clients always increases welfare but may decrease training. Methodologically, we explore a matching setting with endogenous types, and illustrate useful adaptations of queueing theory techniques for such environments.
29312.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当服务提供者的专业知识通过培训内生演化时的动态任务分配问题。我们刻画了最优分配协议，并将其与自由裁量程序（即由客户选择其服务提供者）进行比较。我们的结果表明，当任务到达更频繁且培训技术改进时，集中化带来的福利收益更大。监控资深服务提供者的客户积压总是能增加福利，但可能会减少培训。在方法论上，我们探索了一个具有内生类型的匹配设定，并展示了排队论技术在此类环境中的有用适应性。
29312.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PR；JEL：C02, C61, C78, D02, J22, L23

29311.title: Big Loans to Small Businesses: Predicting Winners and Losers in an Entrepreneurial Lending Experiment
29311.zh_title: 小企业的大额贷款：预测创业贷款实验中的赢家和输家
29311.authors: Gharad T. Bryan, Dean Karlan, Adam Osman
29311.abstract: We experimentally study the impact of relatively large enterprise loans in Egypt. Larger loans generate small average impacts, but machine learning using psychometric data reveals that ”top-performers” (those with the highest predicted treatment effects) substantially increase profits, while profits drop for poor-performers. The large differences imply that lender credit allocation decisions matter for aggregate income, yet we find that existing practice leads to substantial misallocation. We argue that some entrepreneurs are over-optimistic and squander the opportunities presented by larger loans by taking on too much risk, and show the promise of allocations based on entrepreneurial type relative to firm characteristics.
29311.zh_abstract: 我们通过实验研究了埃及相对较大规模企业贷款的影响。较大规模的贷款产生的平均影响很小，但使用心理测量数据的机器学习揭示，“表现最佳者”（那些具有最高预测处理效应的企业）的利润大幅增加，而表现不佳者的利润则下降。这种巨大差异意味着贷款人的信贷分配决策对总收入至关重要，然而我们发现现有做法导致了严重的错配。我们认为一些企业家过度乐观，通过承担过多风险浪费了较大贷款带来的机会，并展示了基于企业家类型而非企业特征的分配方案的前景。
29311.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, LE, LS, PR；JEL：D22, D24, L26, M21, O12, O16

29310.title: Dynamic Strategic Corporate Finance: A Tug of War with Financial Frictions
29310.zh_title: 动态战略公司金融：带有金融摩擦的拉锯战
29310.authors: Ulrich Doraszelski, João F. Gomes, Felix Nockher
29310.abstract: Access to capital markets plays a key role for the evolution of an industry over time. We develop a benchmark theoretical setting that integrates core corporate finance insights about the impact of financial frictions on investment with those from industrial organization on dynamic competition and industry evolution under perfect capital markets. Using state of the art computational tools to systematically detect and evaluate multiple equilibria and to thoroughly explore the parameter space of our model, we show how, depending on key industry characteristics such as market size, financial frictions impact firms' pricing and investment strategies and the degree of industry concentration.
29310.zh_abstract: 进入资本市场的能力对行业随时间的演变起着关键作用。我们建立了一个基准理论框架，将关于金融摩擦对投资影响的核心公司金融见解与产业组织关于完美资本市场下动态竞争和行业演变的见解整合起来。利用最先进的计算工具系统地检测和评估多重均衡，并彻底探索我们模型的参数空间，我们展示了根据关键行业特征（如市场规模），金融摩擦如何影响企业的定价和投资策略以及行业集中度。

29309.title: Why Don’t Elite Colleges Expand Supply?
29309.zh_title: 精英大学为何不扩大招生？
29309.abstract: While college enrollment has more-than doubled since 1970, elite colleges have barely increased supply, instead reducing admit rates. We show that straightforward reasons cannot explain this behavior. We propose a model where colleges compete on prestige, measured using relative selectivity or relative admit rates. A key comparative static of the model is that higher demand decreases [increases] the admit rate when the weight on prestige is above [below] a critical value, consistent with experience in elite [non-elite] colleges. A calibrated version of the model closely replicates the pattern in the data of declining admit rates at elite colleges while counter-factual simulations without prestige fail. Prestige competition is inefficient. Allowing elite colleges to collude on admissions strategy internalizes the non-pecuniary prestige externality and is Pareto improving.
29309.zh_abstract: 尽管自1970年以来大学入学人数增加了一倍多，但精英大学几乎没有增加招生名额，反而降低了录取率。我们表明，简单的理由无法解释这种行为。我们提出了一个模型，其中大学在声望上竞争，声望通过相对选择性或相对录取率来衡量。该模型的一个关键比较静态是，当声望权重高于[低于]临界值时，更高的需求会降低[提高]录取率，这与精英[非精英]大学的经验一致。该模型的校准版本密切复制了数据中精英大学录取率下降的模式，而没有声望的反事实模拟则无法做到这一点。声望竞争是低效的。允许精英大学在招生策略上合谋，可以内部化非金钱的声望外部性，并且是帕累托改进的。
29309.meta: Programs：CH, ED, IO, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H23, I2, L1

29308.title: Why Does Education Increase Voting? Evidence from Boston’s Charter Schools
29308.zh_title: 教育为何能提高投票率？来自波士顿特许学校的证据
29308.abstract: Americans with more education vote more, but we know little about whether this effect on civic participation arises from educational quality or quantity. Using admissions lotteries at Boston charter schools, we estimate the impacts of charter attendance on academic and voting outcomes. We first confirm that there are large academic gains from charter school attendance. Second, we find that charter attendance boosts voter participation, substantially increasing voter participation in the first presidential election after a student turns 18 by six percentage points from a baseline of 35 percent. This effect operates through increased turnout, as there is no increase in voter registration. Rich data enable us to explore multiple potential channels of this voting impact, and our evidence suggests that charters increase voting by increasing noncognitive skills.
29308.zh_abstract: 受教育程度更高的美国人投票更多，但我们对于这种对公民参与的影响是源于教育质量还是教育数量知之甚少。利用波士顿特许学校的入学抽签，我们估算了特许学校出勤对学业和投票结果的影响。我们首先确认，特许学校出勤带来了巨大的学业收益。其次，我们发现特许学校出勤提高了选民参与率，使学生年满18岁后的第一次总统选举的选民参与率从35%的基线水平大幅提高了6个百分点。这种效应是通过提高投票率实现的，因为选民登记没有增加。丰富的数据使我们能够探索这种投票影响的多个潜在渠道，我们的证据表明，特许学校通过提高非认知技能来增加投票率。
29308.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D72, H75, I21

29307.title: Recovery from the COVID-19 Recession: Uneven Effects among Young Workers?
29307.zh_title: 新冠疫情衰退后的复苏：年轻工人中的不均衡影响？
29307.abstract: In this paper, we examine the labor market recovery from the COVID-19 recession and test for effects of termination of pandemic unemployment insurance programs among 15-24-year-olds. We use data from the January 2016-October 2022 Current Population Survey. Using regression-based methods, we show that while 15-19-year-olds experienced a brisk, full recovery in labor market outcomes from the COVID-19 recession, the recovery was sluggish and incomplete among 20-24-year-olds, with some work outcomes lagging below pre-pandemic norms well into 2022. Termination of pandemic UI programs led to increased work hours and full-time employment among 20-24-year-olds but did not have these effects among 15-19-year-olds.
29307.zh_abstract: 本文研究了新冠疫情衰退后的劳动力市场复苏，并检验了终止疫情失业保险计划对15-24岁人群的影响。我们使用了2016年1月至2022年10月的当前人口调查数据。通过基于回归的方法，我们发现，尽管15-19岁人群在新冠疫情衰退后的劳动力市场结果上经历了迅速且完全的复苏，但20-24岁人群的复苏则缓慢且不完整，部分工作结果直到2022年仍低于疫情前水平。终止疫情失业保险计划导致20-24岁人群的工作时间和全职就业增加，但对15-19岁人群没有产生这些影响。

29306.title: Racial Disparities in Housing Returns
29306.zh_title: 住房回报中的种族差异
29306.abstract: We document the existence of a racial gap in realized housing returns that is an order of magnitude larger than disparities arising from housing costs alone, and is driven by differences in distressed home sales (i.e., foreclosures and short sales). Black and Hispanic homeowners are both more likely to experience a distressed sale and to live in neighborhoods where distressed sales erase more house value. However, absent financial distress, houses owned by minorities do not appreciate at substantially slower rates than houses owned by non-minorities. Racial differences in liquid wealth and income stability are important determinants of differences in distress.
29306.zh_abstract: 我们记录了已实现住房回报中存在的种族差距，其规模比仅由住房成本引起的差异大一个数量级，并且是由困境房屋销售（即止赎和短售）的差异驱动的。黑人和西班牙裔房主既更有可能经历困境销售，也更有可能居住在困境销售会抹去更多房屋价值的社区。然而，在没有财务困境的情况下，少数族裔拥有的房屋的增值速度并不显著慢于非少数族裔拥有的房屋。流动财富和收入稳定性的种族差异是困境差异的重要决定因素。

29305.title: Foundations of Demand Estimation
29305.authors: Steven T. Berry, Philip A. Haile
29305.abstract: Demand elasticities and other features of demand are critical determinants of the answers to most positive and normative questions about market power or the functioning of markets in practice. As a result, reliable demand estimation is an essential input to many types of research in Industrial Organization and other fields of economics. This chapter presents a discussion of some foundational issues in demand estimation. We focus on the distinctive challenges of demand estimation and strategies one can use to overcome them. We cover core models, alternative data settings, common estimation approaches, the role and choice of instruments, and nonparametric identification.
29305.zh_abstract: 需求弹性及其他需求特征是回答大多数关于市场势力或市场实际运作的实证和规范问题的关键决定因素。因此，可靠的需求估计是产业组织及其他经济学领域许多类型研究的重要输入。本章讨论需求估计中的一些基础性问题。我们聚焦于需求估计的独特挑战以及可用于克服这些挑战的策略。我们涵盖了核心模型、不同的数据设定、常见的估计方法、工具变量的作用与选择，以及非参数识别。

29304.title: Demand Composition and the Strength of Recoveries
29304.zh_title: 需求构成与复苏的强度
29304.abstract: We argue that recoveries from demand-driven recessions with expenditure cuts concentrated in services or non-durables will tend to be weaker than recoveries from recessions more biased towards durables. Intuitively, the smaller the bias towards more durable goods, the less the recovery is buffeted by pent-up demand. We show that, in a standard multi-sector business-cycle model, this prediction holds if and only if, following an aggregate demand shock to all categories of spending (e.g., a monetary shock), expenditure on more durable goods reverts back faster. This testable condition receives ample support in U.S. data. We then use (i) a semi-structural shift-share and (ii) a structural model to quantify this effect of varying demand composition on recovery dynamics, and find it to be large. We also discuss implications for optimal stabilization policy.
29304.zh_abstract: 我们认为，如果需求驱动的衰退中支出削减集中在服务业或非耐用品，那么其复苏往往比更偏向耐用品的衰退的复苏更弱。直观上，对更耐用品偏向越小，复苏受到被压抑需求的缓冲就越少。我们证明，在一个标准的多部门商业周期模型中，当且仅当在面临对所有支出类别的总需求冲击（例如货币冲击）后，对更耐用品的支出恢复得更快时，这一预测才成立。这一可检验的条件在美国数据中得到了充分支持。然后，我们使用（i）半结构化的份额转移方法和（ii）一个结构化模型来量化这种需求构成变化对复苏动态的影响，并发现其影响很大。我们还讨论了对最优稳定政策的启示。

29303.title: International Reserve Management and Firm Investment in Emerging Market Economies
29303.zh_title: 新兴市场经济体的国际储备管理与企业投资
29303.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Yin-Wong Cheung, Xingwang Qian
29303.abstract: We examine the effects of active international reserve management (IRM) conducted by central banks of emerging market economies (EMEs) on firm investment in the presence of global financial shocks. Using firm-level data from 46 EMEs from 2000 to 2018, we document three findings. First, active IRM is found to affect firm investment positively. The effect strengthens when the magnitude of adverse external financial shocks increases. Second, financially constrained firms, compared to unconstrained ones, are less responsive to active IRM. Third, we find that 30% of the causal effect of IRM on firm investment is mediated through the country credit spread channel.
29303.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在全球金融冲击存在的情况下，新兴市场经济体中央银行进行的积极国际储备管理对企业投资的影响。使用2000年至2018年46个新兴市场经济体的企业层面数据，我们记录了三个发现。首先，发现积极的国际储备管理对企业投资有正向影响。当不利的外部金融冲击幅度增大时，这种效应会增强。其次，与不受融资约束的企业相比，受融资约束的企业对积极国际储备管理的反应较小。第三，我们发现，国际储备管理对企业投资的因果效应中，有30%是通过国家信用利差渠道传导的。

29302.title: The Evolution of Skill Use Within and Between Jobs
29302.zh_title: 工作内与工作间技能使用的演变
29302.authors: Costas Cavounidis, Vittoria Dicandia, Kevin Lang, Raghav Malhotra
29302.abstract: We develop a tractable general equilibrium model for understanding within- and between-occupation changes in skill use over time. We apply the model to skill-use measures from the third, fourth, and revised fourth editions of the Dictionary of Occupational Titles and data from the 1960, 1970, and 1980 Censuses and March Current Population Surveys. We recover changes in skill productivity by exploiting between-occupation movements. Most importantly, finger-dexterity productivity grew rapidly while abstract-skill productivity lagged. We leverage these findings to estimate an inelastic relation between abstract and routine inputs and explain within-occupation shifts in skill use.
29302.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个易于处理的一般均衡模型，用于理解随时间推移工作内与工作间技能使用的变化。我们将该模型应用于来自《职业名称词典》第三版、第四版和修订第四版的技能使用度量，以及来自1960年、1970年和1980年人口普查和三月当前人口调查的数据。我们通过利用职业间的流动来恢复技能生产率的变化。最重要的是，手指灵巧度生产率增长迅速，而抽象技能生产率则滞后。我们利用这些发现来估计抽象投入与常规投入之间的非弹性关系，并解释工作内技能使用的变化。

29301.title: Technology Adoption and Market Allocation:The Case of Robotic Surgery
29301.zh_title: 技术采纳与市场配置：以机器人手术为例
29301.authors: Danea Horn, Adam Sacarny, R. Annetta Zhou
29301.abstract: The adoption of healthcare technology is central to improving productivity in this sector. To provide new evidence on how technology affects healthcare markets, we focus on one area where adoption has been particularly rapid: surgery for prostate cancer. Over just six years, robotic surgery grew to become the dominant intensive prostate cancer treatment method. Using a difference-in-differences design, we show that adopting a robot drives prostate cancer patients to the hospital. To test whether this result reflects market expansion or business stealing, we also consider market-level effects of adoption and find they are significant but smaller, suggesting that adoption expands the market while also reallocating some patients across hospitals. Marginal patients are relatively young and healthy, inconsistent with the concern that adoption broadens the criteria for intervention to patients who would gain little from it. We conclude by discussing implications for the social value of technology diffusion in healthcare markets.
29301.zh_abstract: 医疗技术的采纳对于提高该部门的生产率至关重要。为了提供关于技术如何影响医疗市场的新证据，我们聚焦于一个采纳特别迅速的领域：前列腺癌手术。在短短六年内，机器人手术发展成为占主导地位的浸润性前列腺癌治疗方法。使用双重差分设计，我们表明采纳机器人会驱使前列腺癌患者前往该医院。为了检验这一结果是反映了市场扩张还是业务窃取，我们还考虑了采纳的市场层面效应，发现其显著但较小，这表明采纳既扩大了市场，也重新分配了一些患者到不同医院。边际患者相对年轻且健康，这与采纳将干预标准扩大到获益甚微的患者的担忧不一致。最后，我们讨论了这些发现对医疗市场中技术扩散的社会价值的启示。

29300.title: The Sahm Rule and Predicting the Great Recession Across OECD Countries
29300.zh_title: 萨姆规则与预测经合组织国家的大衰退
29300.abstract: We examine the start date of the Great Recession across OECD countries based on two successive quarters of negative GDP growth recession. For most OECD countries this establishes the start of recession in Q22008 or Q32008. We find that the Sahm Rule identifies the start of recession in the US to the beginning of 2008 but in other OECD countries it identifies the start in almost every case, after that identified by GDP. But the GDP and labor market data are subject to major revisions, so the turn is not apparent in most countries for some time. We establish our own rule for predicting recession using the fear of unemployment series to predict recession. It involves looking for a ten-point rise in the series compared to its previous twelve month low. These surveys are timely and have the major advantage they are not subject to revision. Across the OECD we confirm this finding with other types of qualitative data and especially so in the UK. Qualitative surveys, we show, in the US in 2006 and 2007 predicted the subsequent recession and they did the same in Europe at the end of 2007 and in the early part of 2008.
29300.zh_abstract: 我们基于连续两个季度GDP负增长这一衰退标准，考察了经合组织国家大衰退的起始日期。对于大多数经合组织国家，这确定了衰退始于2008年第二季度或2008年第三季度。我们发现，萨姆规则将美国衰退的开始识别为2008年初，但在其他经合组织国家，它在几乎所有情况下都将衰退开始识别在GDP所识别的时间之后。但GDP和劳动力市场数据会经历重大修订，因此转折点在一段时间内对大多数国家并不明显。我们建立了自己的规则，利用对失业的恐惧序列来预测衰退。该规则涉及寻找该序列相比其前十二个月低点上升十个点的情况。这些调查是及时的，并且具有不会被修订的主要优势。在整个经合组织范围内，我们通过其他类型的定性数据证实了这一发现，尤其是在英国。我们表明，美国2006年和2007年的定性调查预测了随后的衰退，而欧洲在2007年底和2008年初的定性调查也做到了同样的事情。

29338.title: Bayesian Learning
29338.abstract: We survey work using Bayesian learning in macroeconomics, highlighting common themes and new directions. First, we present many of the common types of learning problems agents face---signal extraction problems---and trace out their effects on macro aggregates, in different strategic settings. Then we review different perspectives on how agents get their information. Models differ in their motives for information acquisition and the cost of information, or learning technology. Finally, we survey the growing literature on the data economy, where economic activity generates data and the information in data feeds back to affect economic activity.
29338.zh_abstract: 我们综述了宏观经济学中使用贝叶斯学习的研究，强调了共同主题和新方向。首先，我们介绍了代理人面临的许多常见学习问题类型——信号提取问题——并追溯了它们在不同战略环境中对宏观总量的影响。然后，我们回顾了关于代理人如何获取信息的不同观点。模型在信息获取动机、信息成本或学习技术方面存在差异。最后，我们综述了关于数据经济日益增长的文献，其中经济活动产生数据，而数据中的信息反馈回来影响经济活动。

29337.title: Decrypting New Age International Capital Flows
29337.zh_title: 解密新时代国际资本流动
29337.authors: Clemens Graf von Luckner, Carmen M. Reinhart, Kenneth S. Rogoff
29337.abstract: This paper employs high frequency transactions data on the world’s oldest and most extensive centralized peer-to-peer Bitcoin market, which enables trade in the currencies of more than 135 countries. We develop an algorithm that allows, with high probability, the detection of “crypto vehicle transactions” in which crypto currency is used to move capital across borders or facilitate domestic transactions. In contrast to previous work which has used “on-chain” data, our approach enables one to investigate parts of the vastly larger pool of “off-chain” transactions. We find that, as a conservative lower bound, over 7 percent of the 45 million trades on the exchange we explore represent crypto vehicle transactions in which Bitcoin is used to make payment in fiat currency. Roughly 20 percent of these represent international capital flight/flows/remittances. Although our work cannot be used to put a price on cryptocurrencies, it provides the first systematic quantitative evidence that the transactional use of cryptocurrencies constitutes a fundamental component of their value, at least under the current regulatory regime.
29337.zh_abstract: 本文利用世界上最古老、最广泛的中心化点对点比特币市场的高频交易数据，该市场支持超过135个国家的货币交易。我们开发了一种算法，能够以高概率检测“加密车辆交易”，即使用加密货币跨境转移资本或促进国内交易。与之前使用“链上”数据的研究不同，我们的方法能够调查规模大得多的“链下”交易池的一部分。我们发现，作为保守的下限，在我们研究的交易所的4500万笔交易中，超过7%是加密车辆交易，其中比特币被用于以法定货币进行支付。其中大约20%代表国际资本外逃/流动/汇款。尽管我们的工作不能用于为加密货币定价，但它提供了第一个系统的定量证据，表明加密货币的交易用途构成了其价值的基本组成部分，至少在当前的监管制度下是如此。
29337.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E42, E51, E58, F21, F24, F32, F38

29336.title: Exposure, Experience, and Expertise: Why Personal Histories Matter in Economics
29336.zh_title: 暴露、经历与专长：为何个人经历在经济学中重要
29336.abstract: Personal experiences of economic outcomes, from global financial crises to individual-level job losses, can shape individual beliefs, risk attitudes, and choices for years to come. A growing literature on experience effects shows that individuals act as if past outcomes that they experienced were overly likely to occur again, even if they are fully informed about the actual likelihood. This reaction to past experiences is long-lasting though it decays over time as individuals accumulate new experiences. Modern brain science helps understand these processes. Evidence on neuroplasticity reveals that personal experiences and learning alter the strength of neural connections and fine-tune the brain structure to those past experiences ("use-dependent brain"). I show that experience effects help understand belief formation and decision-making in a wide area of economic applications, including inflation, home purchases, mortgage choices, and consumption expenditures. I argue that experience-based learning is broadly applicable to economic decision-making and discuss topics for future research in education, health, race, and gender economics.
29336.zh_abstract: 个人对经济结果的经历，从全球金融危机到个人层面的失业，可能会在多年后塑造个人的信念、风险态度和选择。关于经历效应的日益增长的文献表明，即使个人完全了解实际可能性，他们也会表现得好像过去经历过的结果极有可能再次发生。这种对过去经历的反应是持久的，尽管随着个人积累新经历而随时间衰减。现代脑科学有助于理解这些过程。关于神经可塑性的证据表明，个人经历和学习会改变神经连接的强度，并使大脑结构适应这些过去的经历（“使用依赖性大脑”）。我表明，经历效应有助于理解广泛经济应用中的信念形成和决策，包括通货膨胀、购房、抵押贷款选择和消费支出。我认为基于经历的学习广泛适用于经济决策，并讨论了教育、健康、种族和性别经济学领域的未来研究主题。

29335.title: Tracing Value Added in the Presence of Foreign Direct Investment
29335.zh_title: 存在外国直接投资情况下的增加值追踪
29335.authors: Zhi Wang, Shang-Jin Wei, Xinding Yu, Kunfu Zhu
29335.abstract: We develop a unified framework to trace value added along global supply chains in the presence of foreign direct investment by decomposing either GDP based on forward linkages or final production based on backward linkages. The new framework accounts for the presence of foreign invested enterprises (FIEs), their interactions with local firms in the host countries as well as their activities in international trade. The size of the GVC activities identified with this framework roughly doubles that in the previous literature that treats FIEs the same as local firms. The “missing GVC activities” are more serious for high-tech sectors than for those with a lower R&D intensity, and more serious for high-income economies than for middle-income economies.
29335.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个统一框架，用于在存在外国直接投资的情况下追踪全球供应链中的增加值，该框架通过基于前向关联分解国内生产总值或基于后向关联分解最终生产来实现。新框架考虑了外资企业的存在、它们与东道国当地企业的互动以及它们在国际贸易中的活动。使用该框架识别的全球价值链活动规模大约是先前将外资企业与当地企业同等对待的文献中的两倍。对于高研发强度的高科技行业，这种“缺失的全球价值链活动”比低研发强度行业更为严重，对于高收入经济体比中等收入经济体更为严重。

29334.title: Minimum Wages and Teenage Childbearing: New Estimates Using a Dynamic Difference-in-Differences Approach
29334.zh_title: 最低工资与青少年生育：基于动态双重差分法的新估计
29334.authors: Daniel I. Rees, Joseph J. Sabia, Rebecca Margolit
29334.abstract: The minimum wage is increasingly viewed as an important tool for improving public health outcomes, including reducing childbearing among teenagers. Taken at face value, recently reported estimates suggest that raising the federal minimum wage to $\$15$ per hour could reduce the number of teenage births by 35,000 per year. Using an event study framework that accounts for dynamic and heterogeneous treatment effects, we find little evidence that minimum wages are causally related to teenage childbearing. Moreover, the estimated effects of minimum wages on teenage sexual behaviors, including contraception use, abstinence, and number of partners are consistently small and statistically insignificant.
29334.zh_abstract: 最低工资正日益被视为改善公共卫生结果的重要工具，包括减少青少年生育。从表面上看，近期报告的估计表明，将联邦最低工资提高到每小时15美元，每年可减少3.5万例青少年生育。我们采用一个考虑动态和异质性处理效应的事件研究框架，发现几乎没有证据表明最低工资与青少年生育存在因果关系。此外，最低工资对青少年性行为（包括避孕使用、禁欲和伴侣数量）的估计效应始终很小且统计上不显著。

29333.title: Creative Destruction, Distance to Frontier, and Economic Development
29333.zh_title: 创造性破坏、与前沿的距离与经济发展
29333.abstract: We construct a model of creative destruction with endogenous firm dynamics. We integrate the theory into a general equilibrium multi-country model of technological convergence where countries interact via international spillovers. We derive implications for both firm dynamics and aggregate productivity dynamics. In richer economies, firms are on average larger and the best firms grow larger over time. In poorer economies, there is little creative destruction, low selection, and firms remain small. We estimate the parameters of the model using firm-level data for India and the United States. We study the effect of counterfactual policy reforms. Industrial policy that selectively targets the more productive firms can be beneficial in poor countries while being harmful in countries close to the economic frontier. The findings echo Acemoglu et al. (2006).
29333.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个具有内生企业动态的创造性破坏模型。我们将该理论整合到一个技术收敛的一般均衡多国模型中，各国通过国际溢出效应相互影响。我们推导出对企业动态和总体生产率动态的影响。在较富裕的经济体中，企业平均规模更大，且最佳企业随时间推移增长更大。在较贫穷的经济体中，创造性破坏很少，选择效应低，企业保持小规模。我们利用印度和美国的企业层面数据估计了模型参数。我们研究了反事实政策改革的效果。针对生产率较高企业的选择性产业政策在贫穷国家可能有益，而在接近经济前沿的国家则可能有害。这一发现与Acemoglu等人（2006）的研究相呼应。

29332.title: The US Pretrial System: Balancing Individual Rights and Public Interests
29332.zh_title: 美国审前制度：平衡个人权利与公共利益
29332.abstract: In this article, we review a growing empirical literature on the effectiveness and fairness of the US pretrial system and discuss its policy implications. Despite the importance of this stage of the criminal legal process, researchers have only recently begun to explore how the pretrial system balances individual rights and public interests. We describe the empirical challenges that have prevented progress in this area and how recent work has made use of new data sources and quasi-experimental approaches to credibly estimate both the individual harms (such as loss of employment or government assistance) and public benefits (such as preventing non-appearance at court and new crimes) of cash bail and pretrial detention. These new data and approaches show that the current pretrial system imposes substantial short- and long-term economic harms on detained defendants in terms of lost earnings and government assistance, while providing little in the way of decreased criminal activity for the public interest. Non-appearances at court do significantly decrease for detained defendants, but the magnitudes cannot justify the economic harms to individuals observed in the data. A second set of studies shows that these costs of cash bail and pretrial detention are disproportionately borne by Black and Hispanic individuals, giving rise to large and unfair racial differences in cash bail and detention that cannot be explained by underlying differences in pretrial misconduct risk. We then turn to policy implications and describe areas of future work that would enable a deeper understanding of what drives these undesirable outcomes.
29332.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们回顾了关于美国审前制度有效性和公平性的日益增长的实证文献，并讨论了其政策含义。尽管这一刑事法律程序阶段至关重要，但研究人员直到最近才开始探索审前制度如何平衡个人权利与公共利益。我们描述了阻碍该领域进展的实证挑战，以及近期研究如何利用新数据源和准实验方法，可靠地估计现金保释和审前拘留对个人的损害（如失业或政府援助损失）和公共效益（如防止不出庭和新的犯罪）。这些新数据和方法表明，当前的审前制度在收入损失和政府援助方面对被拘留被告造成了显著的短期和长期经济损害，而为了公共利益减少犯罪活动方面的效果甚微。被拘留被告的不出庭率确实显著降低，但其幅度无法证明数据中观察到的个人经济损害是合理的。第二组研究表明，现金保释和审前拘留的这些成本不成比例地由黑人和西班牙裔个人承担，导致现金保释和拘留中存在巨大且不公平的种族差异，这无法用潜在的审前不当行为风险差异来解释。然后，我们转向政策含义，并描述了未来工作的领域，这些工作将有助于更深入地理解导致这些不良结果的原因。

29331.title: Charitable Giving Responses to Education Budgets
29331.zh_title: 对教育预算的慈善捐赠反应
29331.abstract: Do changes in government spending affect voluntary contributions to those recipients? We examine how changes in K-12 education budgets impact donations to teachers using data from DonorsChoose.org, an online crowdfunding platform for public school teachers to raise money. We find a positive correlation between budgets and voluntary contributions when not accounting for their endogeneous relationship. With instrumental variables, we find evidence for crowd-out of private giving, though the magnitudes are small relative to spending and do not meaningfully offset budget changes. These results are driven entirely by teachers’ posting of requests.
29331.zh_abstract: 政府支出的变化是否会影响对这些受助者的自愿捐款？我们利用DonorsChoose.org（一个为公立学校教师筹集资金的在线众筹平台）的数据，研究了K-12教育预算变化如何影响对教师的捐赠。我们发现，在不考虑其内生关系时，预算与自愿捐款之间存在正相关。使用工具变量，我们找到了私人捐赠被挤出的证据，尽管其规模相对于支出而言较小，且并未显著抵消预算变化。这些结果完全由教师发布请求所驱动。

29330.title: Supply Chain Resilience: Should Policy Promote Diversification or Reshoring?
29330.zh_title: 供应链韧性：政策应促进多元化还是回流？
29330.authors: Gene M. Grossman, Elhanan Helpman, Hugo Lhuillier
29330.abstract: Supply chain disruptions, which have become commonplace, are often associated with globalization and trade. Little is known about optimal policy in the face of insecure supply chains. Should governments promote resilience by subsidizing backup sources of input supply? Should they encourage firms to source from closer and presumably safer domestic suppliers? We address these questions in a very simple model of production with a single critical input and with exogenous risks of relationship-specific and country-wide supply disturbances. We follow Matsuyama and Ushchev (2020) in positing a class of preferences that are homothetic with a single aggregator and that obey Marshall's Second Law of Demand. The familiar case of CES preferences is a member of the class, but it imposes restrictions that are important for policy conclusions.We find that, in the CES case, a subsidy for diversification achieves the constrained social optimum and dominates a policy that promotes reshoring or offshoring. When the demand elasticity rises with price, two policy instruments generally are needed to achieve efficient supply chains, private investments in resilience may be socially excessive, and policy that alter incentives to invest at home versus abroad may achieve greater welfare than ones that encourage or discourage diversification.
29330.zh_abstract: 供应链中断已变得司空见惯，且通常与全球化和贸易相关。关于面对不安全的供应链时最优政策应如何，我们知之甚少。政府是否应通过补贴投入供应的备用来源来促进韧性？是否应鼓励企业从更近且可能更安全的国内供应商采购？我们在一个非常简单的生产模型中探讨这些问题，该模型包含单一关键投入以及关系特定和国家范围供应中断的外生风险。我们遵循Matsuyama和Ushchev（2020）的方法，假设一类具有单一加总器且服从马歇尔第二需求定律的位似偏好。熟悉的CES偏好是该类的一个成员，但它施加了对政策结论至关重要的限制。我们发现，在CES情形下，多元化补贴实现了受约束的社会最优，并且优于促进回流或离岸外包的政策。当需求弹性随价格上升时，通常需要两种政策工具来实现高效供应链，私人对韧性的投资可能社会过度，而改变国内外投资激励的政策可能比鼓励或抑制多元化的政策带来更高的福利。

29329.title: Market Size and Spatial Growth - Evidence from Germany’s Post-War Population Expulsions
29329.zh_title: 市场规模与空间增长——来自德国战后人口驱逐的证据
29329.abstract: Virtually all theories of economic growth predict a positive relationship between population size and productivity. In this paper I study a particular historical episode to provide direct evidence for the empirical relevance of such scale effects. In the aftermath of the Second World War about 8m ethnic Germans were expelled from their domiciles in Eastern Europe and transferred to West Germany. This inflow increased the German population by almost 20%. Using variation across counties I show that the settlement of refugees had a large and persistent effect on the size of the local population, manufacturing employment and income per capita. I show that these findings are quantitatively consistent with an idea-based model of spatial growth if population mobility is subject to frictions and productivity spillovers occur locally. The model implies that the refugee settlement increased aggregate income per capita by about 12% after 25 years and that the historical settlement rule triggered persistent industrialization of rural areas.
29329.zh_abstract: 几乎所有经济增长理论都预测人口规模与生产率之间存在正相关关系。在本文中，我研究了一个特定的历史事件，以直接证明这种规模效应的实证相关性。第二次世界大战后，约800万德意志裔人被驱逐出他们在东欧的住所，并转移到西德。这一流入使德国人口增加了近20%。利用县级差异，我表明难民安置对当地人口规模、制造业就业和人均收入产生了巨大且持久的影响。我证明，如果人口流动存在摩擦且生产率溢出发生在本地，这些发现与基于思想的空间增长模型在数量上是一致的。该模型表明，难民安置在25年后使人均总收入增加了约12%，并且历史上的安置规则引发了农村地区的持续工业化。

29328.title: Mortality Rates by College Degree Before and During COVID-19
29328.zh_title: COVID-19前后按大学学位划分的死亡率
29328.abstract: It is now established that mortality and excess mortality from COVID-19 differed across racial and ethnic groups in 2020. Less is known about educational differences in mortality during the pandemic. We examine mortality rates by BA status within sex, age, and race/ethnic groups comparing 2020 with 2019. Mortality rates have increasingly differed by BA status in the US in recent years and there are good reasons to expect the gap to have widened further during the pandemic. Using publicly available provisional data from the National Center for Health Statistics we find that mortality rates increased in 2020 over 2019 for those with and without a BA, irrespective of age, sex, or race/ethnicity. Although mortality rates increased by more for those without a BA, the ratio of mortality rates for those with and without a BA changed surprisingly little from 2019 to 2020. The BA was protective against mortality prior to the pandemic, and it was equally protective during the pandemic. Among 60 groups (sex by race/ethnicity by age) that are available in the data, the ratio of mortality rates of those without a BA to those with a BA fell for more than half of the groups. Our results suggest that differences in the risk of infection were less important in structuring mortality by education than differences in the risk of death conditional on infection.
29328.zh_abstract: 现已确定，2020年COVID-19导致的死亡率和超额死亡率在不同种族和民族群体之间存在差异。关于疫情期间教育程度差异对死亡率的影响，我们知之甚少。我们按性别、年龄和种族/民族群体内的学士学位状况考察了2020年与2019年的死亡率。近年来，美国按学士学位状况划分的死亡率差异日益扩大，并且有充分理由预期这一差距在疫情期间进一步扩大。利用国家卫生统计中心公开的临时数据，我们发现，无论是否拥有学士学位，也不论年龄、性别或种族/民族，2020年的死亡率均高于2019年。尽管无学士学位者的死亡率增长更多，但从2019年到2020年，有学士学位与无学士学位者的死亡率之比变化出奇地小。学士学位在疫情前对死亡率具有保护作用，在疫情期间同样具有保护作用。在数据可得的60个群体（按性别×种族/民族×年龄划分）中，超过一半群体的无学士学位与有学士学位者的死亡率之比下降。我们的结果表明，在按教育程度划分的死亡率结构中，感染风险的差异不如感染后死亡风险的差异重要。
29328.meta: Programs：AG, ED, EH；JEL：I1, I21, I24, J1

29326.title: Economic Growth and Bank Innovation
29326.abstract: Based on archival and survey data we show that the maturity of U.S. business loans has been continuously increasing since the mid-1930s when banks invented the term loan. Concurrently, bank innovation first involved the invention of credit analysis and covenant design. Later, bank innovation included the advent of loan sales, increased loan syndications, the opening of the leveraged loan market, and the securitization of loans in collateralized loan obligations. We estimate and calibrate a model of bank innovation to determine the quantitative contribution of bank innovation to economic growth.
29326.zh_abstract: 基于档案和调查数据，我们表明自20世纪30年代中期银行发明定期贷款以来，美国商业贷款的期限持续延长。同时，银行创新首先涉及信用分析和契约设计的发明。后来，银行创新包括贷款销售的出现、贷款银团化的增加、杠杆贷款市场的开放以及贷款在抵押贷款债务中的证券化。我们估计并校准了一个银行创新模型，以确定银行创新对经济增长的定量贡献。
29326.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, EFG, ME, PR；JEL：O0, O11, O30, O43

29325.title: Exposure to Cigarette Taxes as a Teenager and the Persistence of Smoking into Adulthood
29325.zh_title: 青少年时期接触香烟税与吸烟行为持续至成年的关系
29325.authors: Andrew I. Friedson, Moyan Li, Katherine Meckel, Daniel I. Rees, Daniel W. Sacks
29325.abstract: Are teenage and adult smoking causally related? Recent anti-tobacco policy is predicated on the assumption that preventing teenagers from smoking will ensure that fewer adults smoke, but direct evidence in support of this assumption is scant. Using data from three nationally representative sources and cigarette taxes experienced as a teenager as an instrument, we document a strong, positive relationship between teenage and adult smoking: specifically, deterring 10 teenagers from smoking through raising cigarette taxes roughly translates into 5 or 6 fewer eventual adult smokers. We conclude that efforts to reduce teenage smoking can have important, long-lasting consequences on smoking participation and, presumably, health.
29325.zh_abstract: 青少年吸烟与成人吸烟是否存在因果关系？近年来的反烟草政策基于一个假设：阻止青少年吸烟将确保更少的成年人吸烟，但支持这一假设的直接证据很少。利用来自三个全国代表性来源的数据，并以青少年时期经历的香烟税作为工具变量，我们记录了青少年吸烟与成人吸烟之间强烈的正相关关系：具体而言，通过提高香烟税阻止10名青少年吸烟，大致相当于最终减少5或6名成年吸烟者。我们得出结论，减少青少年吸烟的努力可能对吸烟参与率产生重要且持久的影响，并可能对健康产生类似影响。

29324.title: Circles of Trust: Rival Information in Social Networks
29324.zh_title: 信任圈：社交网络中的竞争性信息
29324.authors: Petra Persson, Nikita Roketskiy, Samuel Lee
29324.abstract: We analyze the diffusion of rival information in a social network. In our model, rational agents can share information sequentially, unconstrained by an exogenous protocol or timing. We show how to compute the set of eventually informed agents for any network, and show that it is essentially unique under altruistic preferences. The relationship between network structure and information diffusion is complex because the former shapes both the charity and confidentiality of potential senders and receivers.
29324.zh_abstract: 我们分析了社交网络中竞争性信息的扩散。在我们的模型中，理性主体可以不受外部协议或时间安排约束，按顺序共享信息。我们展示了如何计算任何网络中最终知情主体的集合，并证明在利他偏好下该集合本质上是唯一的。网络结构与信息扩散之间的关系是复杂的，因为前者同时塑造了潜在发送者和接收者的慈善性和保密性。

29323.title: Low Inflation Bends the Phillips Curve around the World
29323.zh_title: 低通胀使全球菲利普斯曲线弯曲
29323.authors: Kristin Forbes, Joseph Gagnon, Christopher G. Collins
29323.abstract: This paper finds strong support for a Phillips curve that becomes nonlinear when inflation is “low”—which our baseline model defines as less than 3 percent. The nonlinear curve is steep when output is above potential (slack is negative), but flat when output is below potential (slack is positive), so that further increases in economic slack have little effect on inflation. This finding is consistent with evidence of downward nominal wage and price rigidity. When inflation is high, the Phillips curve is linear and relatively steep. These results are robust to placing the threshold between the high and low inflation regimes at 2, 3, or 4 percent inflation or for a threshold based on country-specific medians of inflation. In this nonlinear model, international factors play a large role in explaining headline inflation (albeit less so for core inflation), a role that has been increasing since the global financial crisis.
29323.zh_abstract: 本文为菲利普斯曲线在通胀“低”时（我们的基线模型定义为低于3%）变为非线性的观点提供了有力支持。非线性曲线在产出高于潜在水平（负缺口）时陡峭，但在产出低于潜在水平（正缺口）时平坦，因此经济松弛的进一步增加对通胀影响甚微。这一发现与名义工资和价格向下刚性的证据一致。当通胀高时，菲利普斯曲线是线性的且相对陡峭。这些结果对于将高通胀和低通胀体制之间的阈值设定在2%、3%或4%的通胀率，或基于国家特定通胀中位数的阈值时均稳健。在此非线性模型中，国际因素在解释整体通胀（尽管对核心通胀的解释力度较小）方面发挥着重要作用，且自全球金融危机以来这一作用一直在增强。
29323.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E31, E37, E52, E58, F62

29322.title: Corporate Culture
29322.authors: Gary B. Gorton, Jill Grennan, Alexander K. Zentefis
29322.abstract: Corporate culture is an omnibus term that includes many elements like norms, values, knowledge, and customs that are relevant to a firm. Economists have made great progress recently in devising methods of measuring different aspects of corporate culture. These empirical measures of culture have explained mergers and acquisitions, corporate risk-taking, and unethical behaviors observed in corporations, among other topics. We argue that unpacking corporate culture into its components is the right way to research it empirically. Theories of corporate culture are still in development, and we discuss the major contributions thus far. We argue that a theory of the firm and of corporate decision-making that is based on corporate culture is more germane to the practical realities of firms’ inner workings than prevailing theories based on agency costs. Corporate culture has the potential to set the theoretical paradigm for all corporate finance research.
29322.zh_abstract: 企业文化是一个包罗万象的术语，包括与公司相关的许多要素，如规范、价值观、知识和习俗。经济学家最近在设计衡量企业文化不同方面的方法上取得了巨大进展。这些对企业文化的实证测量解释了并购、企业风险承担以及企业中观察到的不道德行为等主题。我们认为，将企业文化分解为其组成部分是进行实证研究的正确方法。企业文化理论仍在发展中，我们讨论了迄今为止的主要贡献。我们认为，基于企业文化的企业理论和企业决策理论比基于代理成本的主流理论更贴近企业内部运作的实际现实。企业文化有潜力为所有公司金融研究设定理论范式。

29320.title: Environmental Drivers of Agricultural Productivity Growth: CO₂ Fertilization of US Field Crops
29320.zh_title: 农业生产力增长的环境驱动因素：美国大田作物的二氧化碳施肥效应
29320.abstract: We present a novel methodology to estimate the CO₂ fertilization effect on crop yields using data from NASA's Orbiting Carbon Observatory satellites. Our study complements field and chamber experiments by examining county-level crop yields under actual growing conditions across the majority of US cropland. For identification, we utilize remotely sensed, year-to-year CO₂ anomalies from county-specific trends and further instrument for these anomalies using wind patterns. We find a CO₂ fertilization effect greater than that reported in most field and chamber experiments. In a thought exercise, we apply the CO₂ fertilization effect estimated in our sample from 2015–2022 backward to 1940. Assuming no other limiting factors, we find that rising CO₂ was a major driver of past yield growth, particularly for wheat—with important implications for estimates of future climate change damages.
29320.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，利用NASA轨道碳观测卫星的数据来估计二氧化碳施肥效应对作物产量的影响。我们的研究通过考察美国大部分农田实际生长条件下的县级作物产量，补充了田间和室内实验。为了识别，我们利用遥感获得的、偏离县级特定趋势的逐年二氧化碳异常值，并进一步使用风模式作为这些异常值的工具变量。我们发现二氧化碳施肥效应大于大多数田间和室内实验报告的结果。在一个思想实验中，我们将2015-2022年样本中估计的二氧化碳施肥效应向后应用于1940年。假设没有其他限制因素，我们发现二氧化碳浓度上升是过去产量增长的主要驱动因素，尤其是对小麦而言——这对未来气候变化损害估计具有重要影响。

29319.title: Learning to Use Trade Agreements
29319.authors: Kala Krishna, Carlos Salamanca, Yuta Suzuki, Christian Volpe Martincus
29319.abstract: Preferential trade areas (PTAs) allow firms to pay zero or preferential tariffs as long as Rules of Origin (ROOs) are met. Meeting them is costly for exporters not only in terms of production costs but also in terms of fixed costs, such as documentation costs. We ask if these fixed costs change with the experience of exporters in obtaining preferential tariffs. We explore this using a unique exporter-importer matched transaction-level customs data set on a group of Latin American countries. We estimate a model-based equation and show that these fixed costs depend on the history of preference utilization.
29319.zh_abstract: 优惠贸易区允许企业在满足原产地规则的情况下支付零关税或优惠关税。满足这些规则对出口商而言成本高昂，不仅体现在生产成本上，还体现在固定成本上，例如文件成本。我们探究这些固定成本是否随出口商获得优惠关税的经验而变化。我们利用一组拉丁美洲国家独特的、匹配出口商-进口商的交易层面海关数据集来探索这一问题。我们估计了一个基于模型的方程，并表明这些固定成本取决于优惠利用的历史。

29318.title: Occupational Licensing and Accountant Quality: Evidence from the 150-Hour Rule
29318.zh_title: 职业许可与会计师质量：来自150小时规则的经验证据
29318.abstract: I examine the effects of occupational licensing on the quality of Certified Public Accountants (CPAs). I exploit the staggered adoption of the 150-hour rule, which increases the educational requirements for a CPA license. The analysis shows that the rule decreases the number of entrants into the profession, reducing both low- and high-quality candidates. Labor market proxies for quality find no difference between 150-hour rule CPAs and the rest. Moreover, rule CPAs exit public accounting at similar rates and have comparable writing quality to their non-rule counterparts. Overall, these findings are consistent with the theoretical argument that increases in licensing requirements restrict the supply of entrants and do little to improve quality in the labor market.
29318.zh_abstract: 我研究了职业许可对注册会计师质量的影响。我利用了150小时规则的分阶段实施，该规则提高了注册会计师执照的教育要求。分析表明，该规则减少了进入该行业的人数，同时减少了低质量和高质量的候选人。劳动力市场中代表质量的代理变量发现，150小时规则下的注册会计师与其他注册会计师之间没有差异。此外，规则下的注册会计师以相似的比率退出公共会计行业，并且其写作质量与非规则下的同行相当。总体而言，这些发现与理论论点一致，即许可要求的增加限制了进入者的供给，并且对改善劳动力市场的质量作用甚微。
29318.meta: Programs：CF, LE, LS, POL；JEL：D45, I21, J2, K2, L51, M1, M12, M21, M4, M40, M41, M5

29317.title: Dynamics of Large Multinationals
29317.abstract: We develop a model of large multinational enterprises, each one producing a continuum of products. These outsized firms compete as oligopolists in a domestic and foreign market, facing competitive pressure from single-product firms that engage in monopolistic competition. The multinational enterprises invest in R&D in order to expand the span of their products and in foreign direct investment (FDI) in order to expand the range of products manufactured by their foreign affiliates. We study the dynamic evolution of these markets and characterize transition dynamics and steady states. In addition to the evolution of product spans, we characterize the evolution of prices, markups, market shares, and exports relative to subsidiary sales. Furthermore, we study comparative dynamics that result from changes in trade costs, R&D costs, the cost of FDI and productivity changes of the multinational firms.
29317.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个大型跨国企业模型，每个企业生产一系列产品。这些超大型企业作为寡头垄断者在国内外市场竞争，面临从事垄断竞争的单产品企业的竞争压力。跨国企业投资于研发以扩大其产品范围，并投资于外国直接投资以扩大其外国子公司制造的产品范围。我们研究了这些市场的动态演变，并刻画了转型动态和稳态。除了产品范围的演变，我们还刻画了价格、加成率、市场份额以及出口相对于子公司销售额的演变。此外，我们研究了由贸易成本、研发成本、外国直接投资成本变化以及跨国企业生产率变化所导致的比较动态。
29317.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：D43, F12, F23, L11, L13, L25

29316.title: Refining Set-Identification in VARs through Independence
29316.zh_title: 通过独立性优化VAR中的集识别
29316.abstract: Identification in VARs has traditionally mainly relied on second moments. Some researchers have considered using higher moments as well, but there are concerns about the strength of the identification obtained in this way. In this paper, we propose refining existing identification schemes by augmenting sign restrictions with a requirement that rules out shocks whose higher moments significantly depart from independence. This approach does not assume that higher moments help with identification; it is robust to weak identification. In simulations we show that it controls coverage well, in contrast to approaches that assume that the higher moments deliver point-identification. However, it requires large sample sizes and/or considerable non-normality to reduce the width of confidence intervals by much. We consider some empirical applications. We find that it can reject many possible rotations. The resulting confidence sets for impulse responses may be non-convex, corresponding to disjoint parts of the space of rotation matrices. We show that in this case, augmenting sign and magnitude restrictions with an independence requirement can yield bigger gains.
29316.zh_abstract: 传统上，VAR中的识别主要依赖于二阶矩。一些研究者也考虑使用高阶矩，但对此种方式获得的识别强度存在担忧。本文提出通过增加符号约束，并加入一项排除高阶矩显著偏离独立性的冲击的要求，来优化现有识别方案。该方法并不假设高阶矩有助于识别，且对弱识别具有稳健性。模拟显示，与假设高阶矩能实现点识别的方法相比，该方法能很好地控制覆盖范围。然而，它需要较大的样本量和/或显著的非正态性才能大幅缩小置信区间的宽度。我们考虑了一些实证应用，发现该方法可以拒绝许多可能的旋转。由此产生的脉冲响应置信集可能是非凸的，对应于旋转矩阵空间中的不相交部分。我们表明，在这种情况下，在符号和幅度约束中加入独立性要求可以带来更大的收益。

29366.title: The Anti-Poverty, Targeting, and Labor Supply Effects of Replacing a Child Tax Credit with a Child Allowance
29366.zh_title: 用儿童津贴取代儿童税收抵免的反贫困、瞄准和劳动供给效应
29366.authors: Kevin Corinth, Bruce D. Meyer, Matthew Stadnicki, Derek Wu
29366.abstract: The replacement of the Child Tax Credit (CTC) with a child allowance has been advocated by numerous policymakers and researchers. We estimate the anti-poverty, targeting, and labor supply effects of such a change by linking survey data with administrative tax and government program data which form part of the Comprehensive Income Dataset (CID). We focus on the provisions of the 2021 Build Back Better Act, which would have increased maximum benefit amounts to $\$3,000$ or $\$3,600$ per child (up from $\$2,000$ per child) and made the full credit available to all low and middle-income families regardless of earnings or income. Initially ignoring any behavioral responses, we estimate that the replacement of the CTC would reduce child poverty by 34% and deep child poverty by 39%. The change to a child allowance would have a larger anti-poverty effect on children than any existing government program, though at a higher cost per child raised above the poverty line than any other means-tested program. Relatedly, the child allowance would allocate a smaller share of its total dollars to families at the bottom of the income distribution—as well as families with the lowest levels of long-term income, education, or health—than any existing means-tested program with the exception of housing assistance. We then simulate anti-poverty effects accounting for labor supply responses. By replacing the CTC (which contained substantial work incentives akin to the EITC) with a child allowance, the policy change would reduce the return to working at all by at least $\$2,000$ per child for most workers with children. Relying on elasticity estimates consistent with mainstream simulation models and the academic literature, we estimate that this change in policy would lead 1.5 million workers (constituting 2.6% of all working parents) to exit the labor force. The decline in employment and the consequent earnings loss would mean that child poverty would only fall by at most 22% and deep child poverty would not fall at all with the policy change.
29366.zh_abstract: 用儿童津贴取代儿童税收抵免（CTC）已得到众多政策制定者和研究人员的倡导。我们通过将调查数据与构成综合收入数据集（CID）的行政税收和政府项目数据相关联，估计了这种变化的反贫困、瞄准和劳动供给效应。我们重点关注2021年《重建更好法案》的条款，该法案将每个儿童的最高福利金额从2000美元提高到3000美元或3600美元，并使所有中低收入家庭无论收入或所得如何都能获得全额抵免。最初忽略任何行为反应，我们估计用儿童津贴取代CTC将使儿童贫困率降低34%，深度儿童贫困率降低39%。转向儿童津贴对儿童的反贫困效果将超过任何现有政府项目，尽管每个脱贫儿童的成本高于任何其他经济状况调查项目。与此相关，儿童津贴分配给收入分配底层家庭——以及长期收入、教育或健康水平最低的家庭——的总金额比例将低于除住房援助外的任何现有经济状况调查项目。然后，我们模拟了考虑劳动供给反应后的反贫困效应。通过用儿童津贴取代包含类似EITC的实质性工作激励的CTC，政策变化将使大多数有子女的工人因工作而获得的回报至少每个儿童减少2000美元。基于与主流模拟模型和学术文献一致的弹性估计，我们估计这一政策变化将导致150万工人（占所有在职父母的2.6%）退出劳动力市场。就业下降及随之而来的收入损失意味着，政策变化后儿童贫困率最多下降22%，而深度儿童贫困率根本不会下降。
29366.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：C42, C81, H2, I32, I38, J2

29365.title: Is Stock Index Membership for Sale?
29365.zh_title: 股票指数成员资格可以买卖吗？
29365.authors: Kun Li, Xin (Kelly) Liu, Shang-Jin Wei
29365.abstract: While major stock market indices are followed by large monetary investments, we document that membership decisions for S&P 500 have a nontrivial amount of discretion. We show that firms’ purchases of S&P ratings appear to improve their chance of entering the index (but purchases of Moody’s ratings do not). Furthermore, firms tend to purchase more S&P ratings when there are openings in the index membership. Such a pattern is also confirmed by an event study that explores a rule change on index membership in 2002. Finally, discretionary additions exhibit subsequent deterioration in financial performance relative to rules-based additions.
29365.zh_abstract: 尽管主要股票市场指数受到大量货币投资的追捧，但我们记录了标普500指数成员资格决策存在相当程度的自由裁量权。我们表明，公司购买标普评级似乎提高了其进入指数的机会（但购买穆迪评级则不然）。此外，当指数成员资格出现空缺时，公司倾向于购买更多标普评级。这种模式也通过一项事件研究得到证实，该研究探讨了2002年指数成员资格规则的变化。最后，与基于规则的增补相比，自由裁量的增补在后续财务表现上出现恶化。

29364.title: Lender Automation and Racial Disparities in Credit Access
29364.zh_title: 贷款机构自动化与信贷获取中的种族差异
29364.authors: Sabrina T. Howell, Theresa Kuchler, David Snitkof, Johannes Stroebel, Jun Wong
29364.abstract: Process automation reduces racial disparities in credit access through enabling smaller loans, broadening banks’ geographic reach, and removing human biases from decision-making. We document these findings in the context of the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP), a setting where private lenders faced no credit risk but decided which firms to serve. Black-owned firms primarily obtained PPP loans from automated fintech lenders, especially in areas with high racial animus. After traditional banks automated their loan processing procedures, their PPP lending to Black-owned firms increased. Our findings cannot be fully explained by racial differences in loan application behaviors, pre-existing banking relationships, firm performance, or fraud rates.
29364.zh_abstract: 流程自动化通过支持更小额的贷款、拓宽银行的地理覆盖范围以及消除决策中的人为偏见，减少了信贷获取中的种族差异。我们在薪资保护计划（PPP）的背景下记录了这些发现，这是一个私人贷款机构不承担信用风险但决定服务哪些企业的环境。黑人拥有的企业主要从自动化金融科技贷款机构获得PPP贷款，尤其是在种族敌意强烈的地区。在传统银行自动化其贷款处理程序后，它们向黑人拥有的企业提供的PPP贷款有所增加。我们的发现无法完全由贷款申请行为、现有银行关系、企业绩效或欺诈率方面的种族差异来解释。
29364.meta: Programs：CF, PE, PR；JEL：G21, G23, G28, G41, J15

29363.title: Misallocation in Indian Agriculture
29363.zh_title: 印度农业中的资源错配
29363.authors: Marijn A. Bolhuis, Swapnika R. Rachapalli, Diego Restuccia
29363.abstract: We exploit substantial variation in land-market institutions across Indian states and detailed household-level panel data to assess the effect of land-market distortions on agricultural productivity. We develop a model of heterogeneous farms and distorted land markets, featuring (a) state-level barriers to land-market participation and (b) idiosyncratic (farm-level) distortions to farm size. We use the framework to separately identify and estimate the two sources of land-market distortions in each state using farm data on productivity, land endowment, land-market participation, and operational farm size. We find substantial differences across states in land-rental barriers with large negative effects on agricultural productivity. An efficient reallocation of land in India increases agricultural productivity by 65 percent and by more than 100 percent in some states, with more than 50% of these effects attributed to state-level rental barriers. Distortions associated with land-market participation contribute substantially to agricultural productivity differences across Indian states.
29363.zh_abstract: 我们利用印度各邦土地市场制度的显著差异以及详细的家户层面面板数据，评估土地市场扭曲对农业生产率的影响。我们构建了一个包含异质性农场和扭曲土地市场的模型，其特点包括：(a) 邦层面的土地市场参与障碍，以及 (b) 农场层面的农场规模异质性扭曲。我们利用该框架，通过农场生产率、土地禀赋、土地市场参与和经营农场规模的数据，分别识别并估计了每个邦土地市场扭曲的两种来源。我们发现各邦在土地租赁障碍方面存在显著差异，对农业生产率产生了巨大的负面影响。印度土地的有效重新配置将使农业生产率提高65%，在某些邦提高超过100%，其中超过50%的效果归因于邦层面的租赁障碍。与土地市场参与相关的扭曲对各邦农业生产率差异有显著贡献。

29362.title: Early Childhood Development, Human Capital and Poverty
29362.zh_title: 儿童早期发展、人力资本与贫困
29362.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Sarah Cattan, Costas Meghir
29362.abstract: Children's experiences during early childhood are critical for their cognitive and socio-emotional development, two key dimensions of human capital. However, children from low income backgrounds often grow up lacking stimulation and basic investments, leading to developmental deficits that are difficult, if not impossible, to reverse later in life without intervention. The existence of these deficits are a key driver of inequality and contribute to the intergenerational transmission of poverty. In this paper, we discuss the framework used in economics to model parental investments and early childhood development and use it as an organizing tool to review some of the empirical evidence on early childhood research. We then present results from various important early childhoods interventions with emphasis on developing countries. Bringing these elements together we draw conclusions on what we have learned and provide some directions for future research.
29362.zh_abstract: 儿童在幼儿期的经历对其认知和社会情感发展至关重要，这是人力资本的两个关键维度。然而，来自低收入背景的儿童往往在成长过程中缺乏刺激和基本投资，导致发展缺陷，如果不进行干预，这些缺陷在以后的生活中很难甚至不可能逆转。这些缺陷的存在是导致不平等的一个关键驱动因素，并助长了贫困的代际传递。在本文中，我们讨论了经济学中用于模拟父母投资和儿童早期发展的框架，并将其作为组织工具来回顾儿童早期研究的一些实证证据。然后，我们展示了各种重要儿童早期干预措施的结果，重点关注发展中国家。综合这些要素，我们总结了所学到的经验，并为未来研究提供了一些方向。
29362.meta: Programs：CH, ED；JEL：I24, I25, I3, J24, O15

29361.title: “Beauty Too Rich for Use”*: Billionaires’ Assets and Attractiveness
29361.zh_title: “美得难以使用”：亿万富翁的资产与吸引力
29361.abstract: We examine how the net worth of billionaires relates to their looks, as rated by 16 people of different gender and ethnicity. Surprisingly, their financial assets are unrelated to their beauty; nor are they related to their educational attainment. As a group, however, billionaires are both more educated and better-looking than average for their age. Men, people who reside in Western countries, and those who inherited substantial wealth, are wealthier than other billionaires. The results do not arise from measurement error or nonrandom sample selectivity. They are consistent with econometric theory about the impact of truncating a sample to include observations only from the extreme tail of the dependent variable. The point is underscored by comparing estimates of earnings equations using all employees in the 2018 American Community Survey to those using a sample of the top 0.1 percent. The findings suggest the powerful role of luck within the extremes of the distributions of economic outcomes.
29361.zh_abstract: 我们研究了亿万富翁的净资产与其外貌之间的关系，外貌由16位不同性别和种族的人评分。令人惊讶的是，他们的金融资产与美貌无关；也与他们的教育程度无关。然而，作为一个群体，亿万富翁比同龄人平均受教育程度更高、外貌更好。男性、居住在西方的国家以及继承了大量财富的人比其他亿万富翁更富有。这些结果并非源于测量误差或非随机样本选择性。它们与关于将样本截断至仅包含因变量极端尾部观测值的计量经济学理论一致。这一点通过比较使用2018年美国社区调查中所有员工估计的收入方程与使用前0.1%样本估计的收入方程得到了强调。研究结果表明，在经济结果分布的极端值中，运气起着强大的作用。

29360.title: The Political Economy of the COVID-19 Fiscal Stimulus Packages of 2020
29360.zh_title: 2020年新冠疫情财政刺激方案的政治经济学
29360.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Yothin Jinjarak, Hien Nguyen, Ilan Noy
29360.abstract: Almost all countries announced fiscal support programs once COVID-19 hit. However, there was significant diversity in the magnitude and composition of these fiscal stimulus programs. These differences were determined by myriad political, financial, social, and economic factors - these factors are our focus. We ask what were the factors that are associated with the structure of the fiscal programs that governments chose to adopt in the early stage of the pandemic in 2020. We answer this question using details about the fiscal programs that were announced by 98 governments in the first six months of the pandemic, together with a large set of explanatory variables. Maybe not surprisingly, we find that politics played a very significant part in determining the size and composition of these fiscal programs. Governments and societies that are less polarized and more capable were able to mobilise more fiscal resources. We also find that it was governments with bigger debt loads that announced bigger programs, but that sovereign spreads were not so clearly associated with the size of these program plans. There is a limit, however, to what we can glean from these cross-country comparisons. Ultimately, the understanding of the politics and political-economy considerations that led to the specific content of each fiscal program will have to rely on information about the actual deliberations in each government’s halls of power, should these ever become public.
29360.zh_abstract: 几乎所有国家在新冠疫情爆发后都宣布了财政支持计划。然而，这些财政刺激计划的规模和构成存在显著差异。这些差异由无数政治、金融、社会和经济因素决定——这些因素正是我们的研究重点。我们探究了哪些因素与各国政府在2020年疫情初期选择采用的财政计划结构相关。我们利用98个政府在疫情前六个月宣布的财政计划细节，以及大量解释变量来回答这个问题。或许并不令人意外的是，我们发现政治在决定这些财政计划的规模和构成方面发挥了非常重要的作用。两极分化程度较低、能力较强的政府和社会能够调动更多的财政资源。我们还发现，债务负担较重的政府宣布了更大的计划，但主权利差与这些计划规模之间的关联并不那么明确。然而，我们从这些跨国比较中能获取的信息是有限的。最终，要理解导致每个财政计划具体内容的政治和政治经济学考量，将不得不依赖于各政府权力殿堂内实际审议的信息——如果这些信息有朝一日能够公开的话。
29360.meta: Programs：EH, IFM；JEL：F5, H12, H62, H63, H84

29359.title: The Effects of Taxes on Innovation: Theory and Empirical Evidence
29359.zh_title: 税收对创新的影响：理论与经验证据
29359.abstract: Income taxes are typically set to raise revenues and redistribute income at the lowest possible efficiency costs, which result from the distortions in individual behaviors that taxes entail. Individuals can respond along many margins, such as labor supply, tax avoidance and evasion, and geographic mobility. But one margin that taxes may affect — innovation — is less frequently considered. Conceptually, taxes reduce the expected net returns to innovation inputs and can reduce innovation. Much like other margins of responses to taxes, this efficiency cost must be taken into account. Innovation is done by a relatively small number of people, but it is nevertheless likely to have widespread benefits. While inventors may have divergent motivations, such as social recognition or the love of discovery, they also face an economic reality. How strongly innovation responds to taxes is an empirical question that has been the subject of a growing body of recent work. In this paper, I study how to account for innovation when setting personal income and capital taxation. I distinguish between two cases: one in which the government can set a differentiated tax on inventors and one in which the government is constrained to set the same tax on all agents. I provide a model that flexibly accounts for the spillovers generated by innovation and the non-pecuniary benefits inventors receive from innovation and derive tax formulas expressed in terms of estimable sufficient statistics. The second part of the paper discusses the empirical evidence on the effects of taxes on the quantity, quality, and location of innovation, as well as tax avoidance and income shifting done through innovation.
29359.zh_abstract: 所得税通常旨在以尽可能低的效率成本来增加收入和再分配收入，这种效率成本源于税收导致的个人行为扭曲。个人可以在多个方面做出反应，例如劳动供给、避税和逃税以及地理迁移。但税收可能影响的一个方面——创新——却较少被考虑。从概念上讲，税收降低了创新投入的预期净回报，并可能减少创新。与对税收的其他反应方式类似，这种效率成本必须被考虑在内。创新是由相对较少的人完成的，但它很可能带来广泛的收益。虽然发明家可能有不同的动机，例如社会认可或对发现的热爱，但他们也面临着经济现实。创新对税收的反应有多强烈是一个实证问题，也是近期越来越多研究的主题。在本文中，我研究了在设定个人所得税和资本税时如何考虑创新。我区分了两种情况：一种是政府可以对发明家设定差别税率，另一种是政府受限于对所有主体设定相同的税率。我提供了一个模型，该模型灵活地考虑了创新产生的溢出效应以及发明家从创新中获得的非金钱收益，并推导出以可估计的充分统计量表示的税收公式。论文的第二部分讨论了关于税收对创新数量、质量和地点影响的经验证据，以及通过创新进行的避税和收入转移行为。
29359.meta: Programs：EFG, PE, PR；JEL：H2, H23, H24, O3, O4

29358.title: Probabilistic Prediction for Binary Treatment Choice: with Focus on Personalized Medicine
29358.zh_title: 二元治疗选择的概率预测：聚焦个性化医疗
29358.abstract: This paper extends my research applying statistical decision theory to treatment choice with sample data, using maximum regret to evaluate the performance of treatment rules. The specific new contribution is to study as-if optimization using estimates of illness probabilities in clinical choice between surveillance and aggressive treatment. Beyond its specifics, the paper sends a broad message. Statisticians and computer scientists have addressed conditional prediction for decision making in indirect ways, the former applying classical statistical theory and the latter measuring prediction accuracy in test samples. Neither approach is satisfactory. Statistical decision theory provides a coherent, generally applicable methodology.
29358.zh_abstract: 本文扩展了我运用统计决策理论、利用样本数据进行治疗选择的研究，使用最大遗憾来评估治疗规则的表现。具体的新贡献在于，研究在临床选择监测与积极治疗时，利用疾病概率估计进行“仿佛优化”。除了其具体内容，本文还传达了一个广泛的信息。统计学家和计算机科学家以间接方式处理了用于决策的条件预测问题，前者应用经典统计理论，后者在测试样本中衡量预测准确性。这两种方法都不令人满意。统计决策理论提供了一种连贯且普遍适用的方法论。

29357.title: Economic Activity and Biodiversity in the United States
29357.zh_title: 美国的经济活动与生物多样性
29357.authors: Yuanning Liang, Ivan J. Rudik, Eric Zou
29357.abstract: The environmental impacts of economic activities extend beyond those directly affecting humans. This paper provides new evidence on the link between economic activity and ecosystem decline using a novel dataset that compiles longitudinal ecological sampling information at tens of thousands of locations across the United States between 1960 and 2015. Local shocks in economic activities, such as those driven by national military buildups, led to a significant reduction in species abundance, diversity, and stability, with one-third of the observed effects explained by the causal impact of air pollution. Government environmental regulations significantly mitigated pollution externalities.
29357.zh_abstract: 经济活动的环境影响超出了直接影响人类的范畴。本文利用一个新颖的数据集，该数据集汇编了1960年至2015年间美国数万个地点的纵向生态采样信息，为经济活动与生态系统衰退之间的联系提供了新证据。经济活动的局部冲击，例如由国家军事建设驱动的冲击，导致了物种丰度、多样性和稳定性的显著下降，其中观察到的约三分之一的影响可由空气污染的因果效应解释。政府的环境法规显著减轻了污染的外部性。

29356.title: A Taste of Their Own Medicine: Guideline Adherence and Access to Expertise
29356.zh_title: 自食其果：指南依从性与专业知识获取
29356.authors: Amy Finkelstein, Petra Persson, Maria Polyakova, Jesse M. Shapiro
29356.abstract: We use administrative data from Sweden to study adherence to 63 medication-related guidelines. We compare the adherence of patients without personal access to medical expertise to that of patients with access, namely doctors and their close relatives. We estimate that observably similar patients with access to expertise have 3.8 percentage points lower adherence, relative to a baseline adherence rate of 54.4 percent among those without access. Our findings suggest an important role in non-adherence for factors other than those, such as ignorance, poor communication, and complexity, that would be expected to diminish with access to expertise.
29356.zh_abstract: 我们利用瑞典的行政数据研究了对63项药物相关指南的依从性。我们比较了没有个人获取医学专业知识途径的患者与有获取途径的患者（即医生及其近亲）的依从性。我们估计，在可观测特征相似的情况下，有专业知识获取途径的患者的依从性比没有获取途径的患者（基线依从率为54.4%）低3.8个百分点。我们的研究结果表明，除了那些预期会随着专业知识获取而减少的因素（如无知、沟通不畅和复杂性）之外，其他因素在不依从性中扮演着重要角色。
29356.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：D83, I12, I18

29355.title: Providing Vouchers and Value Information for Already Free Eye Exams Increases Uptake Among a Low-Income Minority Population: A Randomized Trial
29355.zh_title: 为已免费的视力检查提供代金券和价值信息可提高低收入少数族裔群体的接受率：一项随机试验
29355.authors: Seema Kacker, Mario Macis, Prateek Gajwani, David S. Friedman
29355.abstract: We study whether vouchers with and without value information encourage completion of already free follow-up appointments in a low-income minority population in Baltimore City referred for possible eye disease. Between May 2017 and September 2018, 821 individuals referred for free follow-up from 114 screening events received 1) standard referral, 2) a voucher redeemable for free follow-up and prescription glasses, or 3) a voucher including a statement of monetary value ($\$250$). All referred individuals received patient education, counseling, and appointment reminders. We find that vouchers without and with value information increase follow-up appointments by 12.5 and 20.3 percentage points, respectively, corresponding to a 36%-58% increase compared to the standard referral with no voucher. We conclude that reframing free targeted health service offers by providing vouchers with value information is a promising, low-cost tool to increase uptake.
29355.zh_abstract: 我们研究带有或不带价值信息的代金券是否能鼓励巴尔的摩市因疑似眼病而被转诊的低收入少数族裔群体完成本已免费的后续预约。在2017年5月至2018年9月期间，从114次筛查活动中被转诊进行免费随访的821名个体分别接受了：1) 标准转诊；2) 一张可用于免费随访和配镜的代金券；或 3) 一张包含货币价值声明（250美元）的代金券。所有被转诊的个体都接受了患者教育、咨询和预约提醒。我们发现，不带和带有价值信息的代金券分别使随访预约率提高了12.5和20.3个百分点，与没有代金券的标准转诊相比，这相当于增加了36%-58%。我们得出结论，通过提供带有价值信息的代金券来重新包装免费的针对性健康服务，是一种有前景、低成本的提高接受率的工具。

29354.title: Closing the Innovation Gap in Pink and Black
29354.zh_title: 缩小粉色与黑色中的创新差距
29354.authors: Lisa D. Cook, Janet Gerson, Jennifer Kuan
29354.abstract: Recent research shows the negative impact of discrimination not only on the targets of discrimination but also on the economy as a whole. Racial and gender inequality can limit the entire economy's productive capacity and innovation outcomes. Using new data from NSF's Survey of Earned Doctorates on the scientific workforce from 1980 to 2019, as well as patenting and commercialization data, we examine racial and gender disparities at each stage of the innovation process—education and training, the practice of invention, and commercialization. While improving along certain dimensions over time, we find persistent racial and gender disparities consistent with the current literature. To reverse the negative effects on productive capacity and long-run economic growth, we also discuss the literature on mitigating discriminatory practices at each juncture, which could have significant distributional effects as access to good jobs expands.
29354.zh_abstract: 近期研究显示，歧视不仅对歧视目标产生负面影响，也对整个经济产生负面影响。种族和性别不平等可能限制整个经济的生产能力和创新成果。利用美国国家科学基金会“博士获得者调查”中1980年至2019年科学劳动力的新数据，以及专利和商业化数据，我们考察了创新过程每个阶段——教育与培训、发明实践和商业化——中的种族和性别差异。尽管在某些方面随着时间的推移有所改善，但我们发现了与现有文献一致的持续存在的种族和性别差异。为了扭转对生产能力和长期经济增长的负面影响，我们还讨论了在每个环节减轻歧视性做法的文献，随着获得好工作机会的增加，这可能会产生显著的分配效应。

29353.title: College Choice, Private Options, and The Incidence of Public Investment in Higher Education
29353.zh_title: 大学选择、私立选项与高等教育公共投资的归宿
29353.abstract: Previous measures of the incidence of public investment in higher education focus on the transfer to public college students. This implies that the net benefits to students who do not attend public colleges is negative. However, they miss potential general equilibrium effects on the private college and labor markets. Changes in the public college market affect who private colleges admit, what prices they charge, and the number of students who enroll in any college. We show that capturing these spillovers is important for characterizing incidence using a model of higher education that we validate with quasi-experimental variation in state spending. Unlike previous measures, we find that high-income-modest-ability students especially benefit since they are only admitted to high-quality private colleges when state spending is high, and the public colleges create sufficient competitive pressure. Decreased investment also reduces educational attainment, raising the college wage premium. This exacerbates private college market power.
29353.zh_abstract: 以往衡量高等教育公共投资归宿的方法侧重于对公立大学学生的转移支付。这意味着，不上公立大学的学生获得的净收益为负。然而，这些方法忽略了可能对私立大学和劳动力市场产生的总体均衡效应。公立大学市场的变化会影响私立大学录取谁、收取什么价格以及在任何大学就读的学生数量。我们通过一个高等教育模型表明，捕捉这些溢出效应对于描述归宿至关重要，我们利用州政府支出的准实验性变化验证了该模型。与以往的衡量方法不同，我们发现高收入但能力一般的学生尤其受益，因为只有当州政府支出高时，他们才会被高质量的私立大学录取，并且公立大学创造了足够的竞争压力。投资减少也会降低教育成就，从而提高大学工资溢价。这加剧了私立大学的市场势力。

29352.title: Tax Policy Design with Low Interest Rates
29352.zh_title: 低利率环境下的税收政策设计
29352.abstract: Interest rates on government debt have fallen in many countries over the last several decades, with markets indicating that rates may stay low well into the future. It is by now well understood that sustained low interest rates can change the nature of long-run fiscal policy choices. In this paper, we examine a related issue: the implications of sustained low interest rates for the structure of tax policy. We show that low interest rates (a) reduce the differences between consumption and income taxes; (b) make wealth taxes less efficient relative to capital income taxes, at given rates of tax; (c) reduce the value of firm-level investment incentives, and (d) substantially raise the valuation of benefits of carbon abatement policies relative to their costs.
29352.zh_abstract: 过去几十年，许多国家的政府债务利率有所下降，市场迹象表明利率可能在未来长期保持低位。目前人们已充分认识到，持续的低利率会改变长期财政政策选择的性质。本文探讨一个相关问题：持续低利率对税收政策结构的影响。我们证明，低利率会（a）缩小消费税与所得税之间的差异；（b）在给定税率下，使财富税相对于资本所得税效率更低；（c）降低企业层面投资激励的价值；（d）大幅提高碳减排政策收益相对于成本的估值。

29351.title: What Drives Variation in the U.S. Debt/Output Ratio? The Dogs that Didn't Bark
29351.zh_title: 美国债务/产出比率变动的驱动因素：那些没有吠叫的狗
29351.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Hanno Lustig, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh, Mindy Z. Xiaolan
29351.abstract: Higher U.S. government debt/output ratios do not forecast higher future surpluses or lower real returns on Treasurys. Neither future cash flows nor discount rates account for the variation in the current debt/output ratio. The market valuation of Treasurys is surprisingly insensitive to the macro fundamentals. Instead, the future debt/output ratio accounts for most of the variation. Systematic surplus forecast errors may help to account for these findings. Since the start of the GFC, surplus projections have anticipated a large fiscal correction that failed to materialize.
29351.zh_abstract: 美国更高的政府债务/产出比率并不能预测未来更高的盈余或更低的国债实际回报。无论是未来现金流还是贴现率，都无法解释当前债务/产出比率的变动。国债的市场估值对宏观基本面出奇地不敏感。相反，未来的债务/产出比率解释了大部分变动。系统性盈余预测误差可能有助于解释这些发现。自全球金融危机开始以来，盈余预测一直预期会出现大规模财政调整，但这一调整并未实现。

29350.title: Gender Preferences in Job Vacancies and Workplace Gender Diversity
29350.zh_title: 职位空缺中的性别偏好与工作场所性别多样性
29350.authors: David Card, Fabrizio Colella, Rafael Lalive
29350.abstract: In spring 2005, the Ombud for Equal Treatment in Austria launched a campaign notifying employers and newspapers that gender preferences in job ads were illegal. At the time over 40% of vacancies on the nation’s largest job board stated a gender preference; within a year the rate fell below 5%. We merge job board vacancies and employer records to study how the campaign affected hiring choices and the gender diversity of occupations and workplaces. Using pre-campaign data, we predict the use of gender preferences, then conduct a difference-indifferences analysis of hiring outcomes for vacancies with predicted male or female preferences, relative to those with no predicted preferences. The elimination of explicit gender preferences boosted the share of women hired for jobs that were likely to be targeted to men (and vice versa). At the firm-level, we find that the campaign led to a rise in the share of women at firms that were more likely to use male SGP’s, and a symmetric increase in the share of men at firms that were likely to use female SGP’s, with no effects on firm-survival, employment, or average wages.
29350.zh_abstract: 2005年春季，奥地利平等待遇监察专员发起了一项运动，通知雇主和报社，招聘广告中的性别偏好是非法的。当时，该国最大招聘网站上超过40%的职位空缺注明了性别偏好；一年内，这一比例降至5%以下。我们将招聘网站职位空缺与雇主记录合并，研究该运动如何影响招聘选择以及职业和工作场所的性别多样性。利用运动前的数据，我们预测性别偏好的使用，然后对预测有男性或女性偏好的职位空缺与预测无偏好的职位空缺的招聘结果进行双重差分分析。消除明确的性别偏好提高了原本可能针对男性的职位中女性的招聘比例（反之亦然）。在企业层面，我们发现该运动导致更可能使用男性性别偏好的企业中女性比例上升，以及更可能使用女性性别偏好的企业中男性比例对称性上升，且对企业生存、就业或平均工资没有影响。

29349.title: Illuminating the Effects of the US-China Tariff War on China's Economy
29349.zh_title: 揭示中美关税战对中国经济的影响
29349.abstract: How much has the US-China tariff war impacted economic outcomes in China? We address this question using high-frequency night lights data, together with measures of the trade exposure of fine grid locations constructed from Chinese firms' geo-coordinates. Exploiting within-grid variation over time and controlling extensively for grid-specific contemporaneous trends, we find that each 1 percentage point increase in exposure to the US tariffs was associated with a 0.59% reduction in night-time luminosity. We combine these with structural elasticities that relate night lights to economic outcomes, motivated by the statistical framework of Henderson et al. (2012). The negative impact of the tariff war was highly skewed across locations: While grids with negligible direct exposure to the US tariffs accounted for up to 70% of China's population, we infer that the 2.5% of the population in grids with the largest US tariff shocks saw a 2.52% (1.62%) decrease in income per capita (manufacturing employment) relative to unaffected grids. By contrast, we do not find significant effects from China's retaliatory tariffs.
29349.zh_abstract: 中美关税战对中国经济结果产生了多大影响？我们利用高频夜间灯光数据，以及根据中国企业地理坐标构建的精细网格位置贸易暴露度指标来回答这个问题。利用网格内随时间变化并广泛控制网格特定同期趋势，我们发现，美国关税暴露度每增加1个百分点，夜间灯光亮度下降0.59%。我们结合Henderson等人（2012）统计框架中联系夜间灯光与经济结果的结构弹性。关税战的负面影响在不同地点间高度倾斜：虽然对美国关税直接暴露度可忽略不计的网格覆盖了中国高达70%的人口，但我们推断，受美国关税冲击最大的网格中2.5%的人口，其人均收入（制造业就业）相对于未受影响的网格下降了2.52%（1.62%）。相比之下，我们没有发现中国报复性关税的显著影响。

29348.title: Outsourcing, Inequality and Aggregate Output
29348.abstract: Outsourced workers experience large wage declines, yet domestic outsourcing may raise aggregate productivity. To study this equity-efficiency trade-off, we contribute a framework in which multi-worker firms either hire imperfectly substitutable worker types in-house along a wage ladder, or rent labor services from contractors who hire in the same frictional labor markets. More productive firms select into outsourcing to save on labor costs and higher wage premia. Outsourcing leads firms to raise output and labor demand. Contractor firms pay lower wages. We find reduced-form support for all three implications in French administrative data, instrumenting revenue productivity with export demand shocks and outsourcing costs using variation in occupational exposure. After proving identification and structurally estimating the model, we find that the emergence of outsourcing in France lowers low skill service worker earnings and welfare by 3.1% but raises aggregate output by 1.8%.
29348.zh_abstract: 外包工人经历大幅工资下降，但国内外包可能提高总生产率。为研究这种公平与效率的权衡，我们构建了一个框架，其中多工人企业要么沿着工资阶梯内部雇佣不完全可替代的工人类型，要么从在同一摩擦性劳动力市场雇佣工人的承包商处租赁劳动力服务。生产率更高的企业选择外包以节省劳动力成本和更高的工资溢价。外包导致企业提高产出和劳动力需求。承包商企业支付更低的工资。我们在法国行政数据中找到了所有三个含义的简化形式支持，使用出口需求冲击作为收入生产率的工具变量，并利用职业暴露度的变化作为外包成本的工具变量。在证明识别性并结构性地估计模型后，我们发现，法国外包的出现使低技能服务工人的收入和福利下降3.1%，但使总产出提高1.8%。
29348.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, LS；JEL：E24, E25, E64, F12, J24, J31, J42, O40

29347.title: Rethinking Exchange Rate Regimes
29347.authors: Ethan Ilzetzki, Carmen M. Reinhart, Kenneth S. Rogoff
29347.abstract: This paper employs an updated algorithm and database for classifying exchange rate and anchor currency choice, to explore the evolution of the global exchange rate system, including parallel rates, capital controls and reserves. In line with a large recent literature, we find that the dollar has become ever-more central as the de facto anchor or reference currencies for much of the world. Our discussion encompasses the history of anchor currency choice, methods for classifying exchange rate regimes, a detailed discussion of the evolution of regimes, the growing substitution of reserves for capital controls as a tool for exchange rate stabilization, the modern Triffin dilemma, and the surprising recent trend decline in volatility of exchange rates at the core of the system. It concludes with issues surrounding the rise of China.
29347.zh_abstract: 本文采用更新的算法和数据库对汇率制度和锚定货币选择进行分类，探讨全球汇率体系的演变，包括平行汇率、资本管制和储备。与近期大量文献一致，我们发现美元作为世界大部分地区事实上的锚定或参考货币，其核心地位日益增强。我们的讨论涵盖锚定货币选择的历史、汇率制度分类方法、制度演变的详细讨论、储备替代资本管制作为汇率稳定工具的趋势、现代特里芬困境，以及近期体系核心汇率波动性出人意料的趋势性下降。最后以围绕中国崛起的问题作为结论。

29346.title: Macroprudential Policy during COVID-19: The Role of Policy Space
29346.zh_title: COVID-19期间的宏观审慎政策：政策空间的作用
29346.abstract: This paper uses the initial phase of the COVID-19 pandemic to examine how macroprudential frameworks developed over the past decade performed during a period of heightened financial and economic stress. It discusses a new measure of the macroprudential stance that better captures the intensity of different policies across countries and time. Then it shows that macroprudential policy has been used countercyclically—with stances tightened during the 2010’s and eased in response to COVID-19 by more than previous risk-off periods.
