Countries that tightened macroprudential policy more aggressively before COVID, as well as those that eased more during the pandemic, experienced less financial and economic stress. Countries’ ability to use macroprudential policy, however, was significantly constrained by the extent of existing “policy space”, i.e., by how aggressively policy was tightened before COVID-19. The use of macroprudential tools was not significantly affected by the space available to use other policy tools (such as fiscal policy, monetary policy, FX intervention, and capital flow management measures), and the use of other tools was not significantly affected by the space available to use macroprudential policy. This suggests that although macroprudential tools are being used countercyclically and should therefore help stabilize economies and financial markets, there appears to be an opportunity to better integrate the use of macroprudential tools with other policies in the future.
29346.zh_abstract: 本文利用COVID-19大流行的初始阶段，考察过去十年发展起来的宏观审慎框架在金融和经济压力加剧时期的表现。我们讨论了一种新的宏观审慎立场衡量指标，该指标能更好地捕捉不同政策在不同国家和时间点的强度。然后我们表明，宏观审慎政策已被逆周期使用——立场在2010年代收紧，并在应对COVID-19时比以往风险规避时期更大幅度地放松。在COVID之前更积极收紧宏观审慎政策的国家，以及在大流行期间更大幅度放松的国家，经历的金融和经济压力较小。然而，各国使用宏观审慎政策的能力受到现有“政策空间”程度的显著约束，即COVID之前政策收紧的力度。宏观审慎工具的使用并未受到其他政策工具（如财政政策、货币政策、外汇干预和资本流动管理措施）可用空间的显著影响，而其他工具的使用也未受到宏观审慎政策可用空间的显著影响。这表明，尽管宏观审慎工具正被逆周期使用，因此应有助于稳定经济和金融市场，但未来似乎有机会更好地将宏观审慎工具的使用与其他政策相结合。
29346.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E58, E61, E63, F38, G18, G28

29345.title: From Just in Time, to Just in Case, to Just in Worst-Case: Simple models of a Global Supply Chain under Uncertain Aggregate Shocks.
29345.zh_title: 从准时制到以防万一再到最坏情况：不确定总冲击下全球供应链的简单模型
29345.authors: Bomin Jiang, Daniel E. Rigobon, Roberto Rigobon
29345.abstract: Covid-19 highlighted the weaknesses in the supply chain. Many have argued that a more resilient or robust supply chain is needed. But what does a robust supply chain mean? And how do firms’ decisions change when taken that approach? This paper studies a very stylized model of a supply chain, where we study how the decision of a multinational corporation changes in the presence of uncertainty. The two standard theories of supply chain are Just-in-time and Just-in-case. Just-in-time argues in favor of pursuing efficiency, while Just-in-case studies how such decision changes when the firm faces idiosyncratic risk. We find that a robust supply chain is very different specially in the presence of systemic shocks. In this case, firms need to concentrate on the worst-case. This strategy implies a supply chain where the allocation of resources and capabilities does not correspond to the standard theories studied in economics, but follow a heuristic behavioral rule called “probability matching”. It has been found in nature and in experimental research that subjects appeal to probability matching when seeking survival. We find that a robust supply chain will reproduce this behavioral outcome. In fact, a multinational optimizing under uncertainty, follows a probability matching which leads to an allocation that is suboptimal from the individual producer point of view, but rules out the possibility of supply disruptions.
29345.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情凸显了供应链的弱点。许多人认为需要更具韧性或稳健性的供应链。但稳健的供应链意味着什么？当采取这种方法时，企业的决策如何变化？本文研究了一个非常简化的供应链模型，探讨跨国公司在不确定性存在时其决策如何变化。供应链的两种标准理论是准时制和以防万一制。准时制主张追求效率，而以防万一制研究当企业面临异质性风险时决策如何变化。我们发现，稳健的供应链非常不同，尤其是在存在系统性冲击的情况下。在这种情况下，企业需要专注于最坏情况。这种策略意味着供应链中的资源和能力分配不符合经济学中研究的标准理论，而是遵循一种称为“概率匹配”的启发式行为规则。在自然界和实验研究中发现，主体在寻求生存时会诉诸概率匹配。我们发现，稳健的供应链会重现这种行为结果。事实上，在不确定性下进行优化的跨国公司遵循概率匹配，这导致从单个生产者角度看次优的分配，但排除了供应中断的可能性。
29345.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI；JEL：E7, F02, F12, F13, L15

29344.title: Business News and Business Cycles
29344.authors: Leland Bybee, Bryan T. Kelly, Asaf Manela, Dacheng Xiu
29344.abstract: We propose an approach to measuring the state of the economy via textual analysis of business news. From the full text of 800,000 Wall Street Journal articles for 1984–2017, we estimate a topic model that summarizes business news into interpretable topical themes and quantifies the proportion of news attention allocated to each theme over time. News attention closely tracks a wide range of economic activities and explains 25% of aggregate stock market returns. A text-augmented VAR demonstrates the large incremental role of news text in modeling macroeconomic dynamics. We use this model to retrieve the narratives that underlie business cycle fluctuations.
29344.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种通过商业新闻文本分析来衡量经济状况的方法。基于1984年至2017年间80万篇《华尔街日报》文章的全文，我们估计了一个主题模型，该模型将商业新闻归纳为可解释的主题，并量化了随时间推移分配给每个主题的新闻关注比例。新闻关注度紧密追踪广泛的经济活动，并解释了25%的股市总体回报。一个文本增强型向量自回归模型展示了新闻文本在建模宏观经济动态中的巨大增量作用。我们利用该模型来提取经济周期波动背后的叙事。

29343.title: Hysteresis in Unemployment: Evidence from OECD Estimates of the Natural Rate
29343.zh_title: 失业的滞后效应：来自经合组织自然率估计的证据
29343.abstract: This paper studies the dynamics of unemployment (u) and its natural rate (u*), with u* measured by real-time estimates for 29 countries from the OECD. We find strong evidence of hysteresis: an innovation in u causes u* to change in the same direction, and therefore has permanent effects. For our baseline specification, a one percentage point deviation of u from u* for one year has a long-run effect of 0.16 points on both variables. When we allow asymmetry, we find, perhaps surprisingly, that decreases in u have larger long-run effects than increases in u.
29343.zh_abstract: 本文研究了失业率（u）及其自然率（u*）的动态变化，其中u*采用经合组织对29个国家的实时估计值。我们发现了滞后效应的有力证据：u的冲击会导致u*朝同一方向变化，从而产生永久性影响。在我们的基准设定中，失业率u相对于u*每年偏离一个百分点，对这两个变量的长期影响均为0.16个百分点。当我们允许非对称性时，我们发现，或许令人惊讶的是，失业率下降比上升具有更大的长期影响。

29342.title: Estimating the Net Fiscal Cost of a Child Tax Credit Expansion
29342.zh_title: 估算儿童税收抵免扩张的净财政成本
29342.authors: Jacob Goldin, Elaine Maag, Katherine Michelmore
29342.abstract: Recent proposals to expand the Child Tax Credit (CTC) are at the center of current policy discussions in the United States. We study the fiscal cost of three such proposals that would expand refundability of the credit to low-income children, increase the maximum credit amount, and/or eliminate the income phase-out to make the credit universal. For each proposal, we use the Current Population Survey to estimate three components of the net fiscal cost: the direct cost (additional tax refunds or lower tax liability), revenue changes due to taxpayers’ labor supply responses, and long-term changes in tax revenue due to changes in children’s future earnings. We find that direct costs are by far the most important component but that long-term earning changes also play an important role, offsetting 20% of the direct costs of making the credit fully refundable. In contrast, labor supply responses modestly contribute to the fiscal cost of the CTC expansions we model.
29342.zh_abstract: 近期扩大儿童税收抵免的提案是美国当前政策讨论的核心。我们研究了三个此类提案的财政成本，这些提案将扩大对低收入儿童抵免的可退还性、提高最高抵免额，和/或取消收入逐步淘汰以使抵免普及。对于每个提案，我们使用当前人口调查来估算净财政成本的三个组成部分：直接成本（额外的退税或更低的税负）、因纳税人劳动供给反应导致的收入变化，以及因儿童未来收入变化导致的长期税收收入变化。我们发现，直接成本是迄今为止最重要的组成部分，但长期收入变化也起着重要作用，抵消了使抵免完全可退还的直接成本的20%。相比之下，劳动供给反应对我们建模的儿童税收抵免扩张的财政成本贡献较小。

29341.title: The Psychosocial Effects of the Flint Water Crisis on School-Age Children
29341.zh_title: 弗林特水危机对学龄儿童的心理社会影响
29341.authors: Sam Trejo, Gloria Yeomans-Maldonado, Brian Jacob
29341.abstract: Lead poisoning has well-known impacts for the developing brain of young children, with a large literature documenting the negative effects of elevated blood lead levels on academic and behavioral outcomes. In April of 2014, the municipal water source in Flint, Michigan was changed, causing lead from aging pipes to leach into the city’s drinking water. In this study, we use Michigan’s universe of longitudinal, student-level education records, combined with home water service line inspection data containing the location of lead pipes, to empirically examine the effect of the Flint Water Crisis on educational outcomes of Flint public school children. We leverage parallel causal identification strategies, a between-district synthetic control analysis and a within-Flint difference-in-differences analysis, to separate out the direct health effects of lead exposure from the broad effects of living in a community experiencing a crisis. Our results highlight a less well-appreciated consequence of the Flint Water Crisis – namely, the psychosocial effects of the crisis on the educational outcomes of school-age children. These findings suggest that cost estimates which rely only on the negative impact of direct lead exposure substantially underestimate the overall societal cost of the crisis.
29341.zh_abstract: 铅中毒对幼儿发育中的大脑有众所周知的影响，大量文献记录了血铅水平升高对学业和行为结果的负面影响。2014年4月，密歇根州弗林特市的市政水源被更换，导致老化管道中的铅渗入城市饮用水。在本研究中，我们利用密歇根州纵向学生层面教育记录的全体数据，结合包含铅管位置的家庭供水管线检查数据，实证检验弗林特水危机对弗林特公立学校儿童教育成果的影响。我们利用平行的因果识别策略——跨学区的合成控制分析和弗林特内部的倍差法分析——将铅暴露的直接健康影响与生活在经历危机的社区中的广泛影响区分开来。我们的结果突显了弗林特水危机一个较少被认识到的后果——即危机对学龄儿童教育成果的心理社会影响。这些发现表明，仅依赖直接铅暴露负面影响的成本估算会严重低估危机的整体社会成本。
29341.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I10, I21, I28, I30, J01, J18

29387.title: Telemigration and Development: On the Offshorability of Teleworkable Jobs
29387.zh_title: 远程迁移与发展：论可远程工作职位的可离岸性
29387.abstract: The Covid-19 pandemic has introduced huge numbers of employers and employees to remote work. How many of these newly remote jobs will go overseas? We offer a rough quantification based on two observations: 1) offshore work is trade in services, and 2) the number of telemigrants is the volume of this trade divided by the average wage. Combining these with gravity-model estimates, we can roughly predict the number of new telemigrants that would arise from lower barriers to trade in services. Telemigration seems unlikely to be transformative when it comes to the development paths of most emerging economies. The baseline service trade flows are modest, and the standard gravity model restricts modest changes to have modest impacts. There are no tipping points in structural gravity models. Finally, we propose a simple model of telemigration in which small changes can have large consequences. The key is to assume that latent comparative advantage takes a different shape than typically assumed in quantitative trade models. Given this, small changes in trade costs can generate large and asymmetric increases in the exports of service tasks from low-wage nations.
29387.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情让大量雇主和员工接触了远程工作。这些新出现的远程工作中有多少会流向海外？我们基于两个观察提供粗略量化：1）离岸工作是服务贸易，2）远程移民数量等于该贸易量除以平均工资。结合引力模型估计，我们可以大致预测因服务贸易壁垒降低而产生的新远程移民数量。就大多数新兴经济体的发展路径而言，远程迁移似乎不太可能具有变革性。基准服务贸易流量不大，标准引力模型限制微小变化产生微小影响。结构引力模型中不存在临界点。最后，我们提出了一个简单的远程迁移模型，其中小变化可能产生大后果。关键在于假设潜在比较优势的形状与定量贸易模型中通常假设的不同。鉴于此，贸易成本的微小变化可能导致低收入国家服务任务出口的大幅且不对称的增长。

29386.title: Consumption Smoothing or Consumption Binging? The effects of government-led consumer credit expansion in Brazil
29386.zh_title: 消费平滑还是消费狂欢？巴西政府主导的消费信贷扩张效应
29386.authors: Gabriel Garber, Atif R. Mian, Jacopo Ponticelli, Amir Sufi
29386.abstract: Brazil initiated a major credit expansion program through government banks in 2011. The program primarily targeted public sector workers with offers of payroll-backed loans. Using individual-level administrative data we find that the program led to a 15 percentage point rise in debt to initial income for public sector workers. We develop a new method for estimating workers' expected income growth, and show that ''consumption smoothing'' cannot explain the rise in consumer borrowing. Instead, the evidence supports ''consumption binging'': less financially sophisticated workers borrowed more at high real interest rates, and experienced both higher consumption volatility and lower average consumption.
29386.zh_abstract: 巴西于2011年通过国有银行启动了一项重大信贷扩张计划。该计划主要针对公共部门工作人员，提供工资担保贷款。利用个人层面行政数据，我们发现该计划导致公共部门工作人员债务与初始收入之比上升了15个百分点。我们开发了一种新方法来估计工人的预期收入增长，并表明“消费平滑”无法解释消费借贷的上升。相反，证据支持“消费狂欢”：金融素养较低的工人以高实际利率借入更多资金，并经历了更高的消费波动性和更低的平均消费。
29386.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, IFM, POL；JEL：D12, D14, E21, E32, G21, G28, G53, O16

29385.title: Immediate and Longer-Term Housing Market Effects of a Major U.S. Airport Closure
29385.zh_title: 美国主要机场关闭对住房市场的即时与长期影响
29385.authors: Jeffrey P. Cohen, Cletus C. Coughlin, Jonas Crews, Stephen L. Ross
29385.abstract: A busy airport’s closure has large effects on noise, real estate markets, and neighborhood demographics. Using a unique dataset, we examine the effects of closing Denver’s Stapleton Airport on nearby housing markets. We find evidence of immediate anticipatory price effects upon announcement, but no price changes at closing and little evidence of upward trending prices between announcement and closing. However, after the airport closure, more higher-income and fewer black households moved in, and developers built higher quality houses. Finally, post-closing, these demographic and housing stock changes had substantial housing price effects, even after restricting the sample to pre-existing housing sales.
29385.zh_abstract: 繁忙机场的关闭会对噪音、房地产市场以及社区人口结构产生重大影响。我们利用一个独特的数据集，研究了丹佛斯台普顿机场关闭对附近住房市场的影响。我们发现，在关闭公告发布时，存在即时的预期价格效应，但在关闭时没有价格变化，且从公告到关闭期间几乎没有价格上升趋势的证据。然而，机场关闭后，更多高收入家庭迁入，黑人家庭减少，开发商建造了质量更高的房屋。最后，在关闭后，这些人口结构和住房存量的变化产生了显著的住房价格效应，即使将样本限制在已有的住房销售中也是如此。

29384.title: School Food Policy Affects Everyone: Retail Responses to the National School Lunch Program
29384.zh_title: 学校食品政策影响所有人：零售业对全国学校午餐计划的反应
29384.abstract: We study the private market response to the National School Lunch Program, documenting economically meaningful spillovers to non-recipients. We focus on the Community Eligibility Provision (CEP), an expansion of the lunch program under the 2010 Healthy, Hunger-Free Kids Act. Under the CEP, participating schools offer free lunch to all students. We leverage both the staggered roll-out and eligibility criterion for the CEP, which is limited to schools where at least 40% of students participate in other means-tested welfare programs. We find that local adoption of the CEP causes households with children to reduce their grocery purchases, leading to a 10% decline in grocery sales at large retail chains. Retailers respond with chain-level price adjustments: chains with the most exposure lower prices by 2.5% across all outlets in the years following adoption, so that the program's welfare benefits propagate spatially. Using a stylized model of grocery demand, we estimate that, by 2016, the indirect benefit had reduced grocery costs for the median household by approximately 4.5%.
29384.zh_abstract: 我们研究了私人市场对全国学校午餐计划的反应，记录了该计划对非受益者产生的具有经济意义的溢出效应。我们重点关注社区资格规定（CEP），这是2010年《健康、无饥饿儿童法案》下午餐计划的一项扩展。根据CEP，参与学校向所有学生提供免费午餐。我们利用了CEP的分阶段推出和资格标准，该标准仅限于至少40%的学生参与其他经济状况调查福利项目的学校。我们发现，当地采用CEP导致有孩子的家庭减少食品杂货购买，导致大型零售连锁店的食品杂货销售额下降10%。零售商通过连锁层面的价格调整来应对：在采用后的几年里，受影响最大的连锁店将所有门店的价格降低了2.5%，因此该计划的福利效益在空间上得以传播。使用一个简化的食品杂货需求模型，我们估计，到2016年，间接效益使中等家庭的食品杂货成本降低了约4.5%。
29384.meta: Programs：CH, ED, IO, ITI, PE；JEL：H42, I38, L11, R32

29383.title: Fleshing Out the Olive? On Income Polarization in China
29383.zh_title: 充实橄榄？——论中国的收入极化
29383.abstract: In a rare example of an explicit national goal for income distribution besides reducing poverty, China’s leadership has recently committed to expanding the middle-income share—moving to a less polarized “olive-shaped” distribution. Recognizing the potential trade-offs, the paper asks whether China’s experience indicates that income-polarization was a by-product of past economic progress, including poverty reduction. The paper does not find robust time-series evidence of polarizing effects alongside either economic growth or population urbanization (including among those below the national median). There was strong co-movement between polarization and inequality. Larger urban-rural gaps in mean incomes are strongly polarizing in China.
29383.zh_abstract: 除了减少贫困之外，中国领导层最近承诺扩大中等收入群体份额——转向一个极化程度较低的“橄榄形”分配，这是一个罕见的明确国家收入分配目标。认识到潜在的权衡，本文探讨中国的经验是否表明收入极化是过去经济进步（包括减贫）的副产品。本文没有发现强有力的时间序列证据表明极化与经济增长或人口城市化（包括在国家中位数以下的人群中）同时存在。极化与不平等之间存在强烈的联动关系。在中国，城乡平均收入差距越大，极化效应越强。

29382.title: A (Dynamic) Investigation of Stereotypes, Belief-Updating, and Behavior
29382.zh_title: （动态）研究刻板印象、信念更新与行为
29382.authors: Katherine B. Coffman, Paola Ugalde Araya, Basit Zafar
29382.abstract: Many decisions – such as what educational or career path to pursue – are dynamic in nature, with individuals receiving feedback at one point in time and making decisions later. Using a controlled experiment, with two sessions one week apart, we analyze the dynamic effects of feedback on beliefs about own performance and decision-making across two different domains (verbal skills and math). We find significant gender gaps in beliefs and choices before feedback: men are more optimistic about their performance and more willing to compete than women in both domains, but the gaps are significantly larger in math. Feedback significantly shifts individuals' beliefs and choices. Despite this, we see substantial persistence of gender gaps over time. This is particularly true among the set of individuals who receive negative feedback. We find that, holding fixed performance and decisions before feedback, women update their beliefs and choices more negatively than men do after bad news. Our results highlight the challenges involved in overcoming gender gaps in dynamic settings.
29382.zh_abstract: 许多决策——例如选择何种教育或职业道路——本质上是动态的，个体在某个时间点收到反馈，然后在之后做出决策。通过一项控制实验（两次实验间隔一周），我们分析了反馈对两个不同领域（语言技能和数学）中关于自身表现和决策的信念的动态影响。我们发现，在反馈之前，信念和选择存在显著的性别差距：男性在两个领域都对自己的表现更乐观，也更愿意竞争，但在数学领域的差距显著更大。反馈显著改变了个体的信念和选择。尽管如此，我们观察到性别差距随时间持续存在。在收到负面反馈的个体群体中尤其如此。我们发现，在控制反馈前的表现和决策后，女性在收到坏消息后比男性更消极地更新自己的信念和选择。我们的结果凸显了在动态环境中克服性别差距所面临的挑战。

29381.title: Occupational Choice and the Intergenerational Mobility of Welfare
29381.zh_title: 职业选择与福利的代际流动性
29381.abstract: How does parental income shape labor market outcomes? Standard measures of intergenerational mobility typically focus on earnings as the main outcome, but parental income may also influence children’s access to more fulfilling careers. Using U.S. survey data, we show that children from higher-income families are significantly more likely to select occupations offering greater non-monetary qualities such as autonomy, intellectual stimulation, and workplace respect. To explain this pattern, we develop and estimate a model where parental resources allow children to prioritize occupational quality over earnings. When we adjust earnings to compensate for the monetary equivalent of these desirable qualities, intergenerational mobility falls by 15–35%, revealing that traditional income-based measures overstate the equality of opportunity. Finally, we document recent labor market shifts toward higher-quality occupations that raise our compensated measure of intergenerational mobility, suggesting structural changes that may have led to more equal distributions of opportunity.
29381.zh_abstract: 父母收入如何塑造劳动力市场结果？代际流动性的标准衡量通常以收入作为主要结果，但父母收入也可能影响子女获得更有成就感职业的机会。利用美国调查数据，我们表明，来自高收入家庭的子女更有可能选择提供更高非货币品质（如自主性、智力刺激和工作场所尊重）的职业。为了解释这一模式，我们构建并估计了一个模型，其中父母资源允许子女优先考虑职业品质而非收入。当我们调整收入以补偿这些理想品质的货币等价物时，代际流动性下降了15-35%，这表明传统的基于收入的衡量标准高估了机会均等。最后，我们记录了近期劳动力市场向更高质量职业的转变，这提高了我们经补偿后的代际流动性衡量指标，表明结构性变化可能导致了更平等的机会分配。

29380.title: Exposures and Behavioral Responses to Wildfire Smoke
29380.zh_title: 暴露与行为反应：野火烟雾的影响
29380.authors: Marshall Burke, Sam Heft-Neal, Jessica Li, Anne Driscoll, Patrick W. Baylis, Matthieu Stigler, Joakim Weill, Jennifer Burney, Jeff Wen, Marissa Childs, Carlos Gould
29380.abstract: The impacts of environmental change on human outcomes often depend on local exposures and behavioral responses that are challenging to observe with traditional administrative or sensor data. We show how data from private pollution sensors, cell phones, social media posts, and internet search activity yield new insights on exposures and behavioral responses during large wildfire smoke events across the US, a rapidly-growing environmental stressor. Health-protective behavior, mobility, and sentiment all respond to increasing ambient wildfire smoke concentrations, but responses differ by income. Indoor pollution monitors provide starkly different estimates of likely personal exposure during smoke events than would be inferred from traditional ambient outdoor sensors, with similar outdoor pollution levels generating >20x differences in average indoor PM2.5 concentrations. Our results suggest that the current policy reliance on self protection to mitigate health risks in the face of rising smoke exposure will result in modest and unequal benefits.
29380.zh_abstract: 环境变化对人类结果的影响通常取决于局部暴露和难以通过传统行政或传感器数据观察到的行为反应。我们展示了来自私人污染传感器、手机、社交媒体帖子和互联网搜索活动的数据如何为美国大规模野火烟雾事件（一种快速增长的环境压力源）期间的暴露和行为反应提供新见解。健康保护行为、流动性和情绪都对环境野火烟雾浓度的增加做出反应，但反应因收入而异。室内污染监测器提供的烟雾事件期间个人可能暴露的估计值与从传统环境室外传感器推断出的估计值截然不同，相似的室外污染水平导致室内PM2.5平均浓度差异超过20倍。我们的结果表明，当前政策依赖自我保护来减轻因烟雾暴露增加而带来的健康风险，将产生有限且不平等的效益。

29379.title: Predicting the Oil Market
29379.authors: Charles W. Calomiris, Nida Çakır Melek, Harry Mamaysky
29379.abstract: We study the performance of many traditional and novel, text-based variables for in-sample and out-of-sample forecasting of oil spot, futures, and energy company stock returns, and changes in oil volatility, production, and inventories. After controlling for small-sample biases, we find evidence of in-sample predictability. Our text measures, derived using energy news articles, hold their own against traditional variables. While we cannot identify ex-ante rules for selecting successful out-of-sample forecasters, an analysis of all possible two-variable models reveals out-of-sample performance above that expected under random variation. Our findings provide new directions for identifying robust forecasting models for oil markets, and beyond.
29379.zh_abstract: 我们研究了许多传统和基于文本的新变量在样本内和样本外预测石油现货、期货和能源公司股票回报，以及石油波动率、产量和库存变化方面的表现。在控制小样本偏差后，我们发现了样本内可预测性的证据。我们的文本指标（源自能源新闻文章）与传统变量相比毫不逊色。虽然我们无法确定选择成功样本外预测者的先验规则，但对所有可能的双变量模型的分析显示，其样本外表现高于随机变化下的预期。我们的发现为识别石油市场及其他领域的稳健预测模型提供了新方向。
29379.meta: Programs：AP, EEE, IFM；JEL：C52, G10, G12, G14, G17, Q47

29378.title: Data Engineering for Cognitive Economics
29378.zh_title: 认知经济学的数据工程
29378.abstract: Cognitive economics studies imperfect information and decision-making mistakes. A central scientific challenge is that these can’t be identified in standard choice data. Overcoming this challenge calls for data engineering, in which new data forms are introduced to separately identify preferences, beliefs, and other model constructs. I present applications to traditional areas of economic research, such as wealth accumulation, earnings, and consumer spending. I also present less traditional applications to assessment of decision-making skills, and to human-AI interactions. Methods apply both to individual and to collective decisions. I make the case for broader application of data engineering beyond cognitive economics. It allows symbiotic advances in modeling and measurement. It cuts across existing boundaries between disciplines and styles of research.
29378.zh_abstract: 认知经济学研究不完全信息和决策错误。一个核心的科学挑战是，这些无法在标准选择数据中被识别。克服这一挑战需要数据工程，即引入新的数据形式来分别识别偏好、信念和其他模型构念。我展示了在传统经济研究领域（如财富积累、收入和消费者支出）的应用。我还展示了在评估决策技能以及人机交互方面的非传统应用。这些方法既适用于个人决策，也适用于集体决策。我主张在认知经济学之外更广泛地应用数据工程。它允许建模和测量共生进步。它跨越了学科和研究风格之间的现有界限。

29377.title: Pay, Productivity and Management
29377.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Scott W. Ohlmacher, Cristina J. Tello-Trillo, Melanie Wallskog
29377.abstract: Using confidential Census matched employer-employee earnings data we find that employees at more productive firms, and firms with more structured management practices, have substantially higher pay, both on average and across every percentile of the pay distribution. This pay-performance relationship is particularly strong amongst higher paid employees, with a doubling of firm productivity associated with 11% more pay for the highest-paid employee (likely the CEO) compared to 4.7% for the median worker. This pay-performance link holds in public and private firms, although it is almost twice as strong in public firms for the highest-paid employees. Top pay volatility is also strongly related to productivity and structured management, suggesting this performance-pay relationship arises from more aggressive monitoring and incentive practices for top earners.
29377.zh_abstract: 利用保密的普查雇主-雇员匹配收入数据，我们发现，在生产率更高、管理实践更结构化的企业中，员工的薪酬显著更高，这种差异体现在薪酬分布的平均值以及每一个百分位数上。这种薪酬-绩效关系在高薪员工中尤为强烈：企业生产率翻倍与最高薪员工（很可能是CEO）薪酬增加11%相关，而中位数员工仅增加4.7%。这种薪酬-绩效联系在上市公司和私营企业中都存在，尽管对于最高薪员工而言，上市公司中的这种联系几乎是私营企业的两倍。最高薪酬的波动性与生产率和结构化管理也密切相关，这表明这种绩效-薪酬关系源于对高收入者更激进的监督和激励实践。

29376.title: Firms' Inflation Expectations: New Evidence from France
29376.zh_title: 企业的通胀预期：来自法国的新证据
29376.authors: Frédérique Savignac, Erwan Gautier, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Olivier Coibion
29376.abstract: Using a new survey of firms’ inflation expectations in France, we provide novel evidence about the measurement and formation of inflation expectations on the part of firms. First, French firms report inflation expectations with a smaller, but still positive, bias than households and display less disagreement. Second, we characterize the extent and manner in which the wording of questions matters for the measurement of firms’ inflation expectations. Third, we document whether and how the position of the respondent within the firm affects the provided responses. Fourth, because our survey measures firms’ expectations about aggregate and firm-level wage growth along with their inflation expectations, we are able to show that expectations about wages are even more condensed than firms’ inflation expectations and almost completely uncorrelated with them, indicating that firms perceive little link between price and wage inflation. Finally, an experimental treatment indicates that an exogenous change in firms’ inflation expectations has no effect on their aggregate wage expectations.
29376.zh_abstract: 利用一项关于法国企业通胀预期的新调查，我们提供了关于企业通胀预期测量和形成的新证据。首先，法国企业报告的通胀预期偏差比家庭更小（但仍为正），且企业间的分歧更少。其次，我们描述了问题措辞在多大程度上以及以何种方式影响企业通胀预期的测量。第三，我们记录了受访者在企业内的职位是否以及如何影响其提供的回答。第四，由于我们的调查同时测量了企业对总体和公司层面工资增长的预期以及通胀预期，我们能够表明，工资预期比企业通胀预期更加集中，并且两者几乎完全不相关，这表明企业认为价格通胀与工资通胀之间几乎没有联系。最后，一项实验处理表明，企业通胀预期的外生变化对其总体工资预期没有影响。

29375.title: The Impact of Group Size on Giving Versus Demand for Redistribution
29375.zh_title: 群体规模对自愿捐赠与再分配需求的影响
29375.authors: Johanna Mollerstrom, Avner Strulov-Shlain, Dmitry Taubinsky
29375.abstract: We report the results of an online experiment studying preferences for giving and preferences for group-wide redistribution in small (4-person) and large (200-person) groups. We find that the desire to engage in voluntary giving decreases significantly with group size. However, voting for group-wide redistribution is precisely estimated to not depend on group size. Moreover, people’s perception of the size of their reference group is malleable, and affects their desire to give. These results suggest that government programs, such as progressive tax-and-transfer systems, can help satisfy other-regarding preferences for redistribution in a way that creating opportunities for voluntary giving do not.
29375.zh_abstract: 我们报告了一项在线实验的结果，该实验研究了在小型（4人）和大型（200人）群体中，对自愿捐赠的偏好和对群体范围内再分配的偏好。我们发现，自愿捐赠的意愿随着群体规模的增大而显著下降。然而，对群体范围内再分配进行投票的意愿被精确估计为不依赖于群体规模。此外，人们对其参照群体规模的感知是可塑的，并且会影响他们的捐赠意愿。这些结果表明，政府项目（例如累进税和转移支付系统）可以帮助满足人们对再分配的利他偏好，而创造自愿捐赠机会的方式则无法做到这一点。

29374.title: Top Wealth in America: New Estimates and Implications for Taxing the Rich
29374.zh_title: 美国顶层财富：新估计及其对富人征税的启示
29374.authors: Matthew Smith, Owen M. Zidar, Eric Zwick
29374.abstract: This paper uses administrative tax data to estimate top wealth in the United States. We assemble new data that links people to their sources of capital income and develop new methods to estimate the degree of return heterogeneity within asset classes. Disaggregated fixed income data reveal that rich individuals earn much more of their interest income in higher-yielding forms, and have much greater exposure to credit risk. Consequently, in recent years, the interest rate on fixed income at the top is approximately three times higher than the average. Using firm-level characteristics to value firms, we find that twenty percent of total pass-through business wealth accrues to those with losses. We combine this new data on fixed income and pass-through business returns with refined estimates of C-corporation equity, housing, and pension wealth to deliver new capitalized wealth estimates. Our approach---which builds on Saez and Zucman (2016) and Bricker, Henriques, and Hansen (2018)---reduces bias because wealth and rates of return are correlated. From 1989 to 2016, the top 1%, 0.1%, and 0.01% wealth shares increased by 7.6, 5.1, and 3.0 percentage points, respectively, to 31.5%, 15.0%, and 7.0%. While these changes are less dramatic than some prior estimates, wealth is very concentrated: the top 1% holds nearly as much wealth as either the bottom 90% or the "P90-99" class. We discuss implications for income inequality measures, capital tax policy, and savings behavior.
29374.zh_abstract: 本文利用行政税收数据来估计美国的顶层财富。我们汇编了将个人与其资本收入来源联系起来的新数据，并开发了新方法来估计资产类别内部的回报异质性程度。分类固定收益数据显示，富人从收益率更高的形式中获得更多的利息收入，并且面临更大的信用风险敞口。因此，近年来，顶层人群的固定收益利率大约是平均利率的三倍。利用企业层面的特征来评估企业价值，我们发现，总共有20%的穿透式企业财富归属于那些有亏损的企业。我们将这些关于固定收益和穿透式企业回报的新数据，与对C类公司股权、住房和养老金财富的精细估计相结合，以提供新的资本化财富估计。我们的方法——建立在Saez和Zucman (2016)以及Bricker, Henriques和Hansen (2018)的基础上——减少了偏差，因为财富和回报率是相关的。从1989年到2016年，顶层1%、0.1%和0.01%的财富份额分别增加了7.6、5.1和3.0个百分点，达到31.5%、15.0%和7.0%。虽然这些变化不如一些先前的估计那么显著，但财富非常集中：顶层1%持有的财富几乎与底层90%或“P90-99”阶层持有的财富一样多。我们讨论了这些发现对收入不平等衡量、资本税收政策和储蓄行为的启示。
29374.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, LS, ME, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D31, E01, E21, H2

29373.title: The Effect of Medicaid on Care and Outcomes for Chronic Conditions: Evidence from the Oregon Health Insurance Experiment
29373.zh_title: 医疗补助对慢性病护理和结果的影响：来自俄勒冈健康保险实验的证据
29373.abstract: Health insurance may play an important role not only in immediate access to care but in the management of chronic disease, which would have implications for long-run care needs as well as health outcomes. Such causal connections are often difficult to establish, but we use Oregon’s 2008 Medicaid lottery to assess the management of diabetes and asthma, as well as several markers of physical health. This analysis complements several prior studies by introducing new data elements and by analyzing chronically ill subpopulations. While we had previously found that having insurance increases the diagnosis and use of medication for diabetes, we show here that it does not significantly increase the likelihood of diabetic patients receiving recommended care such as eye exams and regular blood sugar monitoring, nor does it improve the management of patients with asthma. We also find no effect on measures of physical health including pulse, obesity, or blood markers of chronic inflammation. Effects of Medicaid on health care utilization appear similar for those with and without pre-lottery diagnoses of chronic physical health conditions. Thus, while Medicaid is an important determinant of access to care overall, it does not appear that Medicaid alone has detectable effects on the management of several chronic physical health conditions, at least over the first two years in this setting. However, sample limitations highlight the value of additional research.
29373.zh_abstract: 健康保险不仅可能在即时获得医疗服务方面发挥重要作用，也可能在慢性病管理方面发挥重要作用，这将影响长期护理需求和健康结果。这种因果关系通常难以建立，但我们利用俄勒冈州2008年的医疗补助抽签来评估糖尿病和哮喘的管理情况，以及若干身体健康指标。这项分析通过引入新的数据元素和分析慢性病亚群，补充了之前的几项研究。虽然我们之前发现拥有保险会增加糖尿病的诊断和药物使用，但我们在此表明，它并未显著增加糖尿病患者接受推荐护理（如眼科检查和定期血糖监测）的可能性，也没有改善哮喘患者的管理。我们还发现，保险对身体健康指标（包括脉搏、肥胖或慢性炎症的血液标志物）没有影响。医疗补助对医疗保健利用的影响，在抽签前有和没有慢性身体健康状况诊断的人群中似乎相似。因此，尽管医疗补助是决定总体医疗服务可及性的重要因素，但仅凭医疗补助本身似乎并未对几种慢性身体健康状况的管理产生可检测的影响，至少在该环境下的头两年内是如此。然而，样本局限性凸显了进一步研究的价值。

29372.title: The Economics of Walking About and Predicting US Downturns
29372.zh_title: “四处走动”的经济学与美国经济衰退预测
29372.abstract: Economic shocks are notoriously difficult to predict but recent research suggests qualitative metrics about economic actors’ expectations are predictive of downturns. We show consumer expectations indices from both the Conference Board and the University of Michigan predict economic downturns up to 18 months in advance in the United States, both at national and at state-level. All the recessions since the 1980s have been predicted by at least 10 and sometimes many more point drops in these expectations indices. A single monthly rise of at least 0.3 percentage points in the unemployment rate also predicts recession, as does two consecutive months of employment rate declines. The economic situation in 2021 is exceptional, however, since unprecedented direct government intervention in the labor market through furlough-type arrangements has enabled employment rates to recover quickly from the huge downturn in 2020. However, downward movements in consumer expectations in the last six months suggest the economy in the United States is entering recession now (Autumn 2021) even though employment and wage growth figures suggest otherwise.
29372.zh_abstract: 经济冲击以其难以预测而闻名，但最近的研究表明，关于经济主体预期的定性指标可以预测经济衰退。我们显示，来自世界大型企业联合会和密歇根大学的消费者预期指数，在美国全国和州层面，都能提前长达18个月预测经济衰退。自20世纪80年代以来的所有衰退，都至少被这些预期指数下降10个点（有时更多）所预测。失业率单月上升至少0.3个百分点也能预测衰退，就业率连续两个月下降也是如此。然而，2021年的经济形势是特殊的，因为政府通过类似强制休假安排对劳动力市场进行了前所未有的直接干预，使得就业率从2020年的巨大衰退中迅速恢复。然而，过去六个月消费者预期的下行表明，美国经济正在进入衰退（2021年秋季），尽管就业和工资增长数据表明情况并非如此。

29371.title: Effects of Opioid-Related Policies on Opioid Utilization, Nature of Medical Care, and Duration of Disability
29371.zh_title: 阿片类药物相关政策对阿片类药物使用、医疗护理性质及残疾持续时间的影响
29371.abstract: We examine the effects of must-access prescription drug monitoring programs (PDMPs) and recent regulations limiting the duration of initial opioid prescriptions on care received by patients with work-related injuries, focusing on opioid utilization and medical care related to pain management. We find that must-access PDMPs contributed to declines in opioid utilization, while regulations limiting duration of initial opioid prescriptions had little effect on whether workers receive opioids, but reduced opioid use among those with prescriptions. We find some evidence that must-access PDMPs affected utilization of other medical care—most interestingly, in light of high opioid use, towards non-opioid pain medication and interventional pain management services for neurologic spine pain. We find that must-access PDMPs and limits on initial prescriptions had little impact on the duration of temporary disability benefits captured at 12 months of maturity.
29371.zh_abstract: 我们研究了强制访问处方药监测计划（PDMPs）和最近限制初始阿片类药物处方持续时间的法规，对工伤患者所接受护理的影响，重点关注阿片类药物使用和与疼痛管理相关的医疗护理。我们发现，强制访问PDMPs导致了阿片类药物使用的下降，而限制初始处方持续时间的法规对工人是否接受阿片类药物影响甚微，但减少了有处方者的阿片类药物使用。我们找到一些证据表明，强制访问PDMPs影响了其他医疗护理的使用——最有趣的是，鉴于阿片类药物的高使用率，转向了非阿片类止痛药和针对神经性脊柱疼痛的介入性疼痛管理服务。我们发现，强制访问PDMPs和对初始处方的限制，对在12个月成熟期时捕获的临时残疾津贴持续时间几乎没有影响。

29370.title: Perceptions and Preferences for Redistribution
29370.zh_title: 对再分配的认知与偏好
29370.abstract: The relationship between the degree of inequality and the demand for redistribution has been a central question in political science and political economy. The famous median-voter model predicts that higher inequality, reflected in a growing gap between the income of the average and the median voter, should lead to increased demand for redistribution, as policymakers cater to the median voter’s preferences (Meltzer and Richard, 1981). Yet, using data from OECD countries, Kenworthy and McCall (2008) show that, despite increases in inequality in those countries, there was no corresponding increase in demand for redistribution. Part of the explanation of this puzzle lies in the realization that it is not only (or even mainly) reality, but perceptions that shape support for policy. This article will explore recent evidence using large-scale social economics surveys and experiments that sheds lights on beliefs about inequality, social mobility, diversity and immigration, social position, and understanding of how policies work.
29370.zh_abstract: 不平等程度与再分配需求之间的关系一直是政治科学和政治经济学的核心问题。著名的中位数选民模型预测，更高的不平等（反映在平均选民与中位数选民收入差距的扩大）应导致再分配需求增加，因为政策制定者会迎合中位数选民的偏好（Meltzer和Richard, 1981）。然而，Kenworthy和McCall (2008) 利用经合组织国家的数据表明，尽管这些国家的不平等加剧，但再分配需求并未相应增加。对这一悖论的部分解释在于认识到，塑造政策支持的不仅仅是（甚至主要不是）现实，而是认知。本文将探讨近期利用大规模社会经济调查和实验获得的证据，这些证据揭示了关于不平等、社会流动性、多样性与移民、社会地位以及政策运作方式的理解等方面的信念。

29368.title: Falling Rates and Rising Superstars
29368.zh_title: 利率下降与超级明星企业崛起
29368.authors: Thomas Kroen, Ernest Liu, Atif R. Mian, Amir Sufi
29368.abstract: Using high frequency interest rate shocks, we find that falling rates in a low interest rate environment favor industry leaders. A fall in interest rate near the zero lower bound leads to a stronger decline in the borrowing rate for industry leaders, who also borrow more, invest more aggressively, and acquire assets at a faster pace. This advantage from falling rates enjoyed by industry leaders diminishes in a higher rate environment. We estimate a “competition-neutral” nominal federal funds rate of about four percentage points, a level at which industry leaders and followers are impacted equally from an interest rate change.
29368.zh_abstract: 利用高频利率冲击，我们发现低利率环境下利率下降有利于行业领导者。当利率接近零下限时，利率下降导致行业领导者借款利率下降幅度更大，他们借款更多、投资更激进、资产收购速度更快。行业领导者从利率下降中获得的这种优势在高利率环境中会减弱。我们估计出一个“竞争中性”的名义联邦基金利率约为4个百分点，在此水平上，利率变动对行业领导者和追随者的影响是均等的。

29367.title: Market Design
29367.abstract: This Handbook chapter seeks to introduce students and researchers of industrial organization (IO) to the field of market design. We emphasize two important points of connection between the IO and market design fields: a focus on market failures—both understanding sources of market failure and analyzing how to fix them—and an appreciation of institutional detail.
29367.zh_abstract: 本《手册》章节旨在向产业组织（IO）的学生和研究人员介绍市场设计领域。我们强调产业组织与市场设计领域之间的两个重要联系：一是关注市场失灵——既理解市场失灵的根源，也分析如何修复它们；二是重视制度细节。

29399.title: The Geography of Job Creation and Job Destruction
29399.zh_title: 就业创造与就业消失的地理分布
29399.authors: Moritz Kuhn, Iourii Manovskii, Xincheng Qiu
29399.abstract: Spatial differences in labor market performance are large and highly persistent. Using data from the United States, Germany, and the United Kingdom, we document striking similarities in spatial differences in unemployment, vacancies, job finding, and job filling within each country. This robust set of facts guides and disciplines the development of a theory of local labor market performance. We find that a spatial version of a Diamond-Mortensen-Pissarides model with endogenous separations and on-the-job search quantitatively accounts for all the documented empirical regularities. The model also quantitatively rationalizes why differences in job-separation rates have primary importance in inducing differences in unemployment across space while changes in the job-finding rate are the main driver in unemployment fluctuations over the business cycle.
29399.zh_abstract: 劳动力市场表现的空间差异很大且高度持久。利用来自美国、德国和英国的数据，我们记录了每个国家内失业率、职位空缺、工作找到率和职位填补率的空间差异中显著的相似性。这一组稳健的事实指导并约束了地方劳动力市场表现理论的发展。我们发现，一个包含内生离职和在职搜寻的空间版本的Diamond-Mortensen-Pissarides模型，在数量上解释了所有已记录的经验规律。该模型还定量地解释了为什么离职率的差异在诱导跨空间失业差异方面具有首要重要性，而工作找到率的变化则是商业周期中失业波动的主要驱动因素。
29399.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：E24, E32, J63, J64, R13

29398.title: The Fiscal and Welfare Effects of Policy Responses to the Covid-19 School Closures
29398.zh_title: 应对新冠疫情学校关闭政策的财政与福利效应
29398.authors: Nicola Fuchs-Schündeln, Dirk Krueger, André Kurmann, Etienne Lalé, Alexander Ludwig, Irina Popova
29398.abstract: Using a structural life-cycle model and data on school visits from Safegraph and school closures from Burbio, we quantify the heterogeneous impact of school closures during the Corona crisis on children affected at different ages and coming from households with different parental characteristics. Our data suggests that secondary schools were closed for in-person learning for longer periods than elementary schools (implying that younger children experienced less school closures than older children), and that private schools experienced shorter closures than public schools, and schools in poorer U.S. counties experienced shorter school closures. We then extend the structural life cycle model of private and public schooling investments studied in Fuchs-Schuendeln, Krueger, Ludwig and Popova (2021) to include the choice of parents whether to send their children to private schools, empirically discipline it with data on parental investments from the PSID, and then feed into the model the school closure measures from our empirical analysis to quantify the long-run consequences of the Covid-19 school closures on the cohorts of children currently in school. Future earnings- and welfare losses are largest for children that started public secondary schools at the onset of the Covid-19 crisis. Comparing children from the top- to children from the bottom quartile of the income distribution, welfare losses are ca. 0.8 percentage points larger for the poorer children if school closures were unrelated to income. Accounting for the longer school closures in richer counties reduces this gap by about 1/3. A policy intervention that extends schools by 3 months (6 weeks in the next two summers) generates significant welfare gains for the children and raises future tax approximately sufficient to pay for the cost of this schooling expansion.
29398.zh_abstract: 利用结构性生命周期模型以及来自Safegraph的学校访问数据和来自Burbio的学校关闭数据，我们量化了新冠危机期间学校关闭对不同年龄且来自不同父母特征家庭的儿童所产生的异质性影响。我们的数据表明，中学关闭面对面教学的时间比小学更长（意味着年幼儿童经历的学校关闭比年长儿童少），私立学校关闭时间比公立学校短，美国较贫困县的学校关闭时间较短。然后，我们扩展了Fuchs-Schuendeln, Krueger, Ludwig和Popova (2021) 中研究的私人和公共教育投资的结构性生命周期模型，加入了父母是否送孩子上私立学校的选择，利用来自PSID的父母投资数据对其进行经验校准，然后将我们实证分析中的学校关闭措施输入模型，以量化新冠疫情学校关闭对当前在校儿童群体的长期后果。未来收入和福利损失最大的是在新冠疫情开始时进入公立中学的儿童。比较收入分配顶部四分之一和底部四分之一的儿童，如果学校关闭与收入无关，较贫困儿童的福利损失大约高出0.8个百分点。考虑到较富裕县学校关闭时间更长，这一差距缩小了约三分之一。一项将学校延长3个月（未来两个暑假各延长6周）的政策干预为儿童带来了显著的福利收益，并提高了未来的税收，大约足以支付这一教育扩展的成本。
29398.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EFG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：E24, E62

29397.title: Bank Runs, Fragility, and Credit Easing
29397.zh_title: 银行挤兑、脆弱性与信贷宽松
29397.abstract: We present a tractable dynamic general equilibrium model of self-fulfilling bank runs, where banks trade capital in competitive and liquid markets but remain vulnerable to runs due to a loss of creditor confidence. We characterize how the vulnerability of an individual bank depends on its leverage position and the economy wide asset prices. We study the effect of credit easing policies, in the form of asset purchases. When a banking crisis is generated by runs, credit easing can reduce the number of defaulting banks and enhance welfare. When the crisis is driven by fundamentals, credit easing may have adverse consequences.
29397.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个易于处理的自我实现银行挤兑的动态一般均衡模型，其中银行在竞争性和流动性市场中交易资本，但由于债权人信心丧失而仍然容易受到挤兑的影响。我们描述了一家银行的脆弱性如何取决于其杠杆头寸和整个经济体的资产价格。我们研究了以资产购买形式实施的信贷宽松政策的效果。当银行危机由挤兑引发时，信贷宽松可以减少违约银行的数量并提高福利。当危机由基本面驱动时，信贷宽松可能产生不利后果。
29397.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM；JEL：E44, E58, F34, G01, G21, G33

29396.title: Blockchain Analysis of the Bitcoin Market
29396.zh_title: 比特币市场的区块链分析
29396.abstract: In this paper, we provide detailed analyses of the Bitcoin network and its main participants. We build a novel database using a large number of public and proprietary sources to link Bitcoin addresses to real entities and develop an extensive suite of algorithms to extract information about the behavior of the main market participants. We conduct three major pieces of analysis of the Bitcoin eco-system. First, we analyze the transaction volume and network structure of the main participants on the blockchain. Second, we document the concentration and regional composition of the miners which are the backbone of the verification protocol and ensure the integrity of the blockchain ledger. Finally, we analyze the ownership concentration of the largest holders of Bitcoin.
29396.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们对比特币网络及其主要参与者进行了详细分析。我们利用大量公开和专有来源构建了一个新颖的数据库，将比特币地址与真实实体联系起来，并开发了一套广泛的算法来提取主要市场参与者行为的信息。我们对比特币生态系统进行了三项主要分析。首先，我们分析了区块链上主要参与者的交易量和网络结构。其次，我们记录了作为验证协议支柱并确保区块链账本完整性的矿工的集中度和区域构成。最后，我们分析了最大比特币持有者的所有权集中度。

29395.title: The Effect of Free School Meals on Household Food Purchases: Evidence from the Community Eligibility Provision
29395.zh_title: 免费校餐对家庭食品购买的影响：来自社区资格规定的证据
29395.authors: Michelle M. Marcus, Katherine G. Yewell
29395.abstract: We find access to universal free school meals through the Community Eligibility Provision (CEP) had a meaningful impact on grocery spending for households with children, with monthly food purchases declining by about $\$11,$ or 5 percent. For households in zip codes with higher exposure, the decline is as high as $\$39$ per month, or 19 percent. The composition of food purchases also changes after CEP, with low income households experiencing a 3 percent improvement in dietary quality. Finally, CEP exposure is associated with an almost 5 percent decline in households classified as food insecure. Our results on the heterogeneous effects of CEP exposure by prior free/reduced price lunch eligibility reveal benefits in terms of both spending, dietary composition, and food insecurity for previously eligible low-income families, suggesting that the stigma of free school meals may be declining after universal access.
29395.zh_abstract: 我们发现，通过社区资格规定（CEP）获得普及的免费校餐，对有儿童家庭的杂货支出产生了显著影响，每月食品购买量减少了约11美元，即5%。对于邮政编码区域中暴露程度较高的家庭，下降幅度高达每月39美元，即19%。在CEP之后，食品购买的构成也发生了变化，低收入家庭的饮食质量提高了3%。最后，CEP暴露与家庭被归类为食品不安全的比例下降近5%相关。我们关于CEP暴露按先前免费/减价午餐资格划分的异质性效应的结果显示，对于先前符合条件的低收入家庭，在支出、饮食构成和食品不安全方面都有益处，这表明在普及准入后，免费校餐的污名可能正在减少。
29395.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH, PE；JEL：H51, I12, I38

29394.title: It All Starts with Beliefs: Addressing the Roots of Educational Inequities by Shifting Parental Beliefs
29394.zh_title: 一切始于信念：通过转变父母信念解决教育不平等根源
29394.authors: John A. List, Julie Pernaudet, Dana Suskind
29394.abstract: Socioeconomic inequalities in child development crystallize at early stages, with associated disparities in parental investment in children. A key to understanding the data patterns is to document the sources underlying the observed inequalities. We first show that there are dramatic differences in parental beliefs across socioeconomic backgrounds (SES), with parents of higher SES being more likely to believe that parental investments impact child development. We then use two field experiments targeted to low-SES families to explore the mutability of such beliefs and their link to parental investments. In both cases, we find that parental beliefs about child development are malleable. The less intensive version of the program based on educational videos changes parental beliefs, but fails to lastingly increase parental investments and child outcomes. By contrast, in the more intensive version of our program combining home visits and feedback, the augmented beliefs are associated with enriched parent-child interactions and improved vocabulary, math, and social-emotional skills for the children. Together, these results suggest that changing parental beliefs can be an important pathway to raising parental investments and reducing socioeconomic gaps in children’s skills, but that simple informational policies may not be sufficient.
29394.zh_abstract: 儿童发展的社会经济不平等在早期阶段就已固化，并伴随着父母对儿童投资的相应差异。理解数据模式的关键在于记录观察到的这些不平等的根源。我们首先表明，不同社会经济背景的父母信念存在显著差异，社会经济地位较高的父母更倾向于相信父母投资会影响儿童发展。然后，我们利用两个针对低社会经济地位家庭的实地实验，探讨这些信念的可变性及其与父母投资的联系。在这两种情况下，我们发现父母关于儿童发展的信念是可塑的。基于教育视频的强度较低的版本项目改变了父母的信念，但未能持久地增加父母投资和儿童成果。相比之下，在我们结合家访和反馈的强度更高的项目版本中，增强的信念与更丰富的亲子互动以及儿童词汇、数学和社交情感技能的改善相关联。总之，这些结果表明，改变父母信念可以成为提高父母投资和缩小儿童技能社会经济差距的重要途径，但简单的信息政策可能不足以实现这一目标。
29394.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH, LS；JEL：C93, D83, I21, J13

29393.title: Who Pays Sin Taxes? Understanding the Overlapping Burdens of Corrective Taxes
29393.zh_title: 谁在支付罪恶税？理解纠正性税收的重叠负担
29393.authors: Christopher Conlon, Nirupama L. Rao, Yinan Wang
29393.abstract: We find that sin good purchases are highly concentrated with 10% of households paying more than 80% of taxes on alcohol and cigarettes. Total sin tax burdens are poorly explained by demographics (including income), but are well explained by eight household clusters defined by purchasing patterns. The two most taxed clusters comprise 8% of households, pay 68% of sin taxes, are older, less educated, and lower income. Taxes on sugary beverages broaden the tax base but add to the burdens of heavily taxed households. Efforts to increase sin taxes should consider the heavy burdens borne by few households.
29393.zh_abstract: 我们发现，罪恶商品的购买高度集中，10%的家庭支付了超过80%的酒精和香烟税。人口统计特征（包括收入）难以解释罪恶税总负担，但由购买模式定义的八个家庭聚类却能很好地解释。税负最重的两个聚类占8%的家庭，支付了68%的罪恶税，这些家庭年龄较大、受教育程度较低、收入较低。对含糖饮料征税扩大了税基，但增加了税负沉重家庭的负担。提高罪恶税的努力应考虑少数家庭承担的沉重负担。

29392.title: Inflation, Interest, and the Secular Rise in Wealth Inequality in the U.S.: Is the Fed Responsible?
29392.zh_title: 通货膨胀、利率与美国财富不平等的长期上升：美联储是否负有责任？
29392.abstract: Two hallmarks of U.S. monetary policy since the 1981-1982 recession have been declining interest rates and moderation in inflation. Coincident with these trends has been a surge in U.S. wealth inequality, with the Gini coefficient up by 0.070 between 1983 and 2019. This paper analyzes the connection between these two developments on the basis of the Survey of Consumer Finances. Contrary to expectations, the paper finds that these two monetary effects have reduced wealth inequality rather than increasing it. The effect is sizeable, with the Gini coefficient declining by 0.045 over these years. Asset price changes and debt devaluation accounted for 72.6 percent of the advance of mean wealth over 1983-2019. They also would have led to a 204.9 percent gain in median wealth, compared to the actual rise of 23.4 percent. Moreover, they have helped lower the racial wealth gap rather than enlarging it. These results are at odds with previous literature in which estimates range from a weak negative effect on inequality to neutral, small positive, and strong positive. In terms of methodology, this paper differs from previous work by focusing on only the direct effects of interest rate changes and inflation on the household balance sheet.
29392.zh_abstract: 自1981-1982年经济衰退以来，美国货币政策的两个显著特征是利率下降和通胀缓和。与此同时，美国财富不平等急剧上升，基尼系数在1983年至2019年间上升了0.070。本文基于消费者金融调查分析了这两种发展之间的联系。与预期相反，本文发现这两种货币效应实际上降低了财富不平等，而非加剧了不平等。这一影响相当显著，基尼系数在这些年间下降了0.045。资产价格变化和债务贬值占1983-2019年平均财富增长的72.6%。它们本应使中位数财富增长204.9%，而实际仅增长23.4%。此外，它们有助于缩小而非扩大种族财富差距。这些结果与以往文献相悖，以往文献的估计范围从不平等的微弱负效应到中性、小的正效应和强的正效应。在方法论上，本文与以往研究的不同之处在于，仅关注利率变化和通货膨胀对家庭资产负债表的直接效应。

29391.title: Do Credit Conditions Move House Prices?
29391.zh_title: 信贷条件是否推动房价变动？
29391.abstract: To what extent did an expansion and contraction of credit drive the 2000s housing boom and bust? The existing literature lacks consensus, with findings ranging from credit having no effect to credit driving most of the house price cycle. We show that the key difference behind these disparate results is the extent to which credit insensitive agents such as landlords and unconstrained savers absorb credit-driven demand, which depends on the degree of segmentation in housing markets. We develop a model with frictional rental markets that allows us to consider cases in between the extremes of no segmentation and perfect segmentation typically assumed in the literature. We argue that the relative elasticities of the price-rent ratio and homeownership with respect to an identified credit shock is a sufficient statistic to measure the degree of segmentation. We estimate this moment using three different credit supply instruments and use it to calibrate our model. Our results reveal that rental markets are highly frictional and closer to fully segmented, which implies large effects of credit on house prices. In particular, changes to credit standards can explain between 34% and 55% of the rise in price-rent ratios over the boom.
29391.zh_abstract: 信贷扩张和收缩在多大程度上驱动了2000年代的房地产繁荣与萧条？现有文献缺乏共识，研究结果从信贷没有影响到信贷驱动了大部分房价周期不等。我们表明，这些不同结果背后的关键差异在于，对信贷不敏感的代理人（如房东和不受约束的储蓄者）吸收信贷驱动需求的程度，这取决于住房市场的分割程度。我们开发了一个带有摩擦性租赁市场的模型，使我们能够考虑介于文献中通常假设的无分割和完全分割极端情况之间的情形。我们认为，相对于已识别的信贷冲击，租金房价比和住房拥有率的相对弹性是衡量分割程度的充分统计量。我们使用三种不同的信贷供给工具估计了这一矩，并用它来校准我们的模型。我们的结果显示，租赁市场摩擦性很高，更接近完全分割，这意味着信贷对房价有巨大影响。特别是，信贷标准的改变可以解释繁荣期间租金房价比上升的34%至55%。

29390.title: The Human Side of Structural Transformation
29390.zh_title: 结构转型中的人的因素
29390.authors: Tommaso Porzio, Federico Rossi, Gabriella V. Santangelo
29390.abstract: We document that nearly half of the global decline in agricultural employment during the 20th-century was driven by new cohorts entering the labor market. A newly compiled dataset of policy reforms supports an interpretation of these cohort effects as human capital. Through the lens of a model of frictional labor reallocation, we conclude that human capital growth, both as a mediating factor and as an independent driver, led to a sharp decline in the agricultural labor supply. This decline accounts, at fixed prices, for 40% of the decrease in agricultural employment. This aggregate effect is roughly halved in general equilibrium.
29390.zh_abstract: 我们记录到，20世纪全球农业就业下降的近一半是由进入劳动力市场的新一代劳动力驱动的。一个新编制的政策改革数据集支持将这些队列效应解释为人力资本。通过一个摩擦性劳动力再分配模型的视角，我们得出结论，人力资本增长——既作为中介因素也作为独立驱动因素——导致了农业劳动力供给的急剧下降。在固定价格下，这一下降解释了农业就业减少的40%。在一般均衡中，这一总体效应大约减半。
29390.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EFG, LS；JEL：J24, J43, J62, L16, O11, O14, O18, R23

29389.title: Interpreting the Will of the People: A Positive Analysis of Ordinal Preference Aggregation
29389.zh_title: 解读人民意愿：序数偏好聚合的实证分析
29389.abstract: Collective decision making requires preference aggregation even if no ideal aggregation method exists (Arrow, 1950). We investigate how individuals think groups should aggregate members' ordinal preferences—that is, how they interpret "the will of the people." Our experiment elicits revealed attitudes toward ordinal preference aggregation and classifies subjects according to the rules they implicitly deploy. Majoritarianism is rare while rules that promote compromise are common. People evaluate relative sacrifice by inferring cardinal utility from ordinal ranks. Cluster analysis reveals that our classification encompasses all important aggregation rules. Aggregation methods exhibit stability across domains and across countries with divergent traditions.
29389.zh_abstract: 集体决策需要偏好聚合，即使不存在理想的聚合方法（Arrow, 1950）。我们研究个人认为群体应如何聚合成员的序数偏好——即他们如何解读“人民意愿”。我们的实验引出了对序数偏好聚合的揭示性态度，并根据被试隐含使用的规则对其进行分类。多数主义罕见，而促进妥协的规则普遍存在。人们通过从序数排名推断基数效用来评估相对牺牲。聚类分析显示，我们的分类涵盖了所有重要的聚合规则。聚合方法在不同领域以及具有不同传统的国家之间表现出稳定性。

29388.title: The Financial Fragility of For-profit Hospitals: Evidence from the COVID-19 Pandemic
29388.zh_title: 营利性医院的财务脆弱性：来自COVID-19大流行的证据
29388.authors: Ge Bai, Daniel Jiménez, Phillip Phan, Luis E. Quintero, Alessandro Rebucci, Xian Sun
29388.abstract: We estimate the likelihood of financial distress of U.S. hospitals in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic using AHA Annual Survey data for 2011-2019 and smartphone mobility data for 2020. We find that while the average likelihood of distress across all hospitals is 28.53 % in 2020, slightly increasing from 2019, for-profit hospitals are much more likely to be distressed. Their average likelihood of financial distress is 39.13 %---a 6.93 percentage point increase from 2019. For-profit hospitals are the main providers of specialty health care services, such as psychiatric and acute long-term care, so their increased likelihood of distress poses a risk to service provision in these specialty areas, and particularly in rural communities. Our prediction model based on mobility data performs very well in sample against actual data and can potentially help policymakers and hospital administrators to monitor financial distress in real-time when case mixes change, or other large shocks materialize.
29388.zh_abstract: 我们利用2011-2019年美国医院协会年度调查数据和2020年智能手机移动数据，估算了2020年因COVID-19大流行美国医院陷入财务困境的可能性。我们发现，2020年所有医院的平均困境可能性为28.53%，较2019年略有上升，但营利性医院更可能陷入困境。其平均财务困境可能性为39.13%——较2019年上升6.93个百分点。营利性医院是精神科和急性长期护理等专业医疗服务的主要提供者，因此其困境可能性的增加对这些专业领域（尤其是农村社区）的服务提供构成风险。我们基于移动数据的预测模型在样本内与实际数据表现良好，并可能帮助政策制定者和医院管理者在病例组合变化或其他重大冲击发生时实时监控财务困境。
29388.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, EFG, EH, PE；JEL：G3, H51, I1, R51, Z21
